[px]Revival after revival, from 1906 onwards 
[px]  Now let me put a little something in here. The 1906 revival was not the only revival. We have had several revivals coming up. 
When one man went off the scene, God raised up another one after a few years. As he raised up these men with a revival, it was the 
same situation, it was the same kind of Outpouring that came in 1906. That revival came for both the just and the unjust. After a while, 
the revivalist then passed off the scene and the people built an organization from it. Then when they organized, they died. Then a little 
[px]while after God raised another revivalist. Raising up these men, from there, other men would go out with healing, signs and wonders, 
and then after a while, the people would build another organization.  
So now that happened from 1906 and it came right up unto a man called Brother F. F. Bosworth. Now that was a gentleman. 
That  man  was  responsible  for  the  Assemblies  of  God  and  a  lot  of  his  ministry  was  to  overseas  mission.  Then  when  that  man  heard 
Brother  Branham,  he  surrendered  and  spent  the  rest  of  his  life  with  William  Branham  and  supported  him  in  every  way.  Brother 
Branham  really  loved  that  man.  He  was  preaching  the  Gospel  long  before  Brother  Branham  started.    When  Brother Bosworth  was 
dying, Brother Branham related that he was on his death bed calling names of brethren whom he had led to the Lord saying, ―Happy to 
meet you, Brother So-and-so. Happy to meet you, Brother So-and-so.‖ He was crossing over from this life and that happened maybe 
for an hour or more. He just greeted the brethren who were in that dimension, then he passed on with the Lord. Brother Branham had 
all good things to say  about Brother  Bosworth, though  Brother  Bosworth  was wrong in some doctrines. But Brother  Branham knew 
that  he  had  the  Baptism;  he  knew  that  Bosworth  was  a  gentleman  and  he  loved  the  Lord.  He  never  contended  with  Bosworth  on 
doctrine because that is how far Brother Bosworth could have served Christ.  He was a sincere man.  
[px]  Quote  W.M.B.: 223 Brother Bosworth, I'll meet you in a better land where you'll not be old anymore, but young." ... two 
hours before he died... He'd been laying, sleeping. He raised up; he looked, and he jumped up from his bed. He said, "Mother, well, I 
haven't seen you for years. Dad, Brother Jim, why," said, "let's see, you was one of my converts to the Lord at Joliet, Illinois." He'd 
been  dead  for  fifty  years.  See?  "Yes."  He  said,  "Here's  Sister  So-and-so.  Yes,  I  led  you  to  the  Lord  at  the  Winnipeg  meeting.  Yeah. 
Why, here's Sister So-and-so. I haven't seen you... Yeah, see, you come to the Lord at so-and-so." And for two straight hours he shook 
hands with ones that he'd led to the Lord, walked right back to his place, and laid down, crossed his hands, and that was it... God rest 
his soul. And may I ever live so faithful that I'll enter that land. (Manifested Sons Of God 60-0518). 
[px] So, this is vital here, that the revival fires went on from 1906 periodically. It was not many years, until 1933, when the Lord 
started  to  use  the prophet. Now if you notice that even after 1933, in 1936, when Brother Branham met the ―Oneness‖ people, the 
revival was still going on from 1906 Pentecost. He ran along with that and preached to the people, and called the people to that same 
1906 anointing, Baptism and everything like that. He was practicing divine healing and doing the work of an evangelist.  
[px]Father of second wave & last revival –  
w. m. branHam 
[px]Now  something  different  happened  in 1946.  An  angel  visited  the  earth  and  a  new  revival  broke  with  a deeper anointing, 
greater signs, greater wonders and that is at the end of the Second World War. Everything was working together to fulfill Scriptures. 
Friends, I had just been born, so I did not know anything about it but, thank God that I could look back now and see why that Prophet 
[px]had such a great revival and I could be a part of this thing today (and we are all thankful, Brethren.) An angel came down from heaven 
and broke a revival. I am here to tell you today that revival was the last revival for that era. From 1906, that was going to be the last 
revival but it came with a deeper anointing.  
 That is where Oral Roberts arose, and Bosworth shared in that, T.L. Osborne and several others. They were in that era. When 
Brother Branham came out with that revival, he recognized all those men as servants of God, (I read it here) ―Filled with the Holy 
Ghost, having the baptism of the Holy Ghost.‖ While Brother Branham recognized that they had the baptism of the Holy Spirit, they 
were preaching Trinitarian doctrine; they were allowing women to preach; and they were building Bible Schools and organizations. 
Now, ―Why did you say that, Brother Bruce?‖ I said that to show you that that baptism of the Holy Ghost was salvation for that time 
to the just and was Power to the unjust also.  
 So when this revival broke in 1946, I am saying to the whole world that Brother Branham had the genuine article of Pentecost 
but  the  rest  of  the  preachers  did  not  have  that because  there  was  not  an  outpouring  of  the  Holy  Spirit  as  in  Acts  2,  in  all  the 
outpourings from 1906 right up to 1946. There was not a return of Pentecost, not even under Brother Branham. The outpouring of the 
Holy Spirit never returned under Brother Branham‘s ministry. What he had was a great gift of divine healing that brought the world to 
America and the tabernacle there for a long time. Then Brother Branham was sent to the World in 1946 and it shook the world seven 
times. Brother Branham was called ―the father‖ of that revival.  
[px]1000 EVANGELISTS HONOURED W.M. BRANHAM’S INFLUENCE ON HEALING MOVEMENT 
[px]―William Marrion Branham (April 6, 1909, Kentucky – December 24, 1965) was an influential Bible minister...Branham is 
considered by many to have initiated the faith healing movement that began in 1947... Branham is often mentioned as the leader or 
first revivalist preacher  of the second wave of Pentecost that swept the country  after World War  Two (the  first wave being Parham, 
Seymour, and others).‖ (From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia) 
[px]―The person universally acknowledged as the revival‘s   ̳father‘ and   ̳pacesetter‘  was  William Branham. The sudden appearance of his  miraculous 
healing campaigns in 1946 set off a spiritual explosion in the Pentecostal movement which was to move to Main Street, U.S.A., by the 1950s and give birth to the 
broader charismatic movement in the 1960s, which currently affects almost every denomination in the country. ...  ̳Branham filled  the  largest  stadiums  and 
meeting  halls in the world.‘... As the pacesetter of  the  healing  revival,  Branham  was  the  primary  source  of  inspiration  in  the  development  of  other  healing 
ministries.  He  inspired  hundreds  of  ministers  to  enter  the  healing  ministry  and  a  multitude  of  evangelists  paid  tribute  to  him  for  the  impact  he  had  upon  their 
work. As early as 1950, over 1,000 healing evangelists gathered at a Voice of Healing [the name of Branham‘s magazine] convention  to  acknowledge  the 
profound influence of Branham on the healing movement" (Dictionary of Pentecostal and Charismatic Movements 1988, p. 372.)

[px]Baptism – immersion in the spirit 
[px]This Scripture is saying that the Holy Ghost was not yet given and over in Luke it is saying that John the Baptist was filled with the Holy Ghost from 
his mother‘s womb. So you could see the picture of all the messages here that we are preaching on.  
May I entitle this subject: ―Pentecostalism – One Hundred Years: Old Testament Holy Ghost Baptism.‖  
Now the word ―baptism‖ I was not able to find in the concordance and reference of the Old Testament. The word was never used to describe the filling 
of the Holy Ghost or the anointing of the Holy Ghost.  
The word ―baptism,‖ means ―to immerse, to dip‖ as in some water.  Now that‘s the same word that is used for ―baptism in water‖ or ―baptism in the 
Spirit.‖ 
In order to baptize you in water, it is not sprinkling or pouring because the word means ―immersion.‖  It means ―to put you down.‖   
Matthew 3:16 <And Jesus, when he was baptized, went up straightway out of the water...>   
Mark 1:9-10  <...Jesus came from Nazareth of Galilee, and was baptized of John in Jordan.  
And straightway coming up out of the water, he saw the heavens opened, and the Spirit like a dove descending upon him:>   
It took a river. If it was sprinkling, he would be on top of the bank and John would have sprinkled Him in a very formal and sanctimonious way and he 
would go. But he allowed Him to come down into the muddy Jordan and then immersed our Lord into the water and raised Him up; and that was the washing of 
the  Lamb  for sacrifice. That  was  water baptism. So  now that  is the  same  word that  is  used for baptism of the  Holy  Spirit; and all that it  means is that  you are 
―immersed‖ into the Spirit of God or you are ―dipped‖ into the Spirit of God. 
So just to clarify this little title here, that is why I choose to speak this morning on  ̳Old Testament Holy Ghost baptism. I want to follow through and use 
that same word, ―baptism‖ because that word ―baptism‖ is represented as ―anointing‖ and ―filled with the Holy Ghost‖. John the Baptist was filled with the Holy 
Ghost. In other words, he was ―immersed in the Holy Ghost.‖ He was ―dipped into the Spirit of God even from his mother‘s womb.‖   
That is a strange thing, that  a  man could receive the Holy  Ghost in  his  mother‘s  womb! Even though  you die and you are in the grave and  this 
outpouring does not come while you are alive, it is coming to you in your grave. So your faith is not in vain. If John the Baptist got it in his mother‘s womb, you 
could get it in the womb of the earth. It is coming to you. 
The baptism of the Holy Ghost just means that you are dipped into the Spirit of God or immersed into the Spirit of God and there are different degrees 
of being immersed into the Spirit of God. The highest immersion that any man ever had was our Lord Jesus.   
John 3:34 <...God giveth not the Spirit by measure unto him.> 
But you and I receive the Spirit by measure but he did not get it by measure.  He had the Fullness of the Godhead resting bodily upon Him. 
[px]Colossians 2:9 <For in him dwelleth all the fulness of the Godhead bodily. >  
So we want to just relax and check this little subject out in the Old Testament that there was a baptism of the Holy Ghost in the Old Testament under the 
title of ―filled  with the Holy Ghost‖ and ―anointed by the Holy Spirit.‖ Now  those two terminologies  were also used in the New  Testament  but  the  word 
―baptism‖ was added. If you notice in your Bible the Scripture said,  
Acts 10:37-38 < ...after the baptism which John preached;  
How God anointed Jesus of Nazareth with the Holy Ghost and with power: who went about doing good, and healing all that were oppressed of the 
devil; for God was with him.>  
Acts 2:4 <And they were all filled with the Holy Ghost, and began to speak with other tongues, as the Spirit gave them utterance.> 
The word ―baptism‖ stands for the filling of the Holy Ghost and the  
word ―anointing‖ also stands for the ―baptism of the Holy Spirit.‖ If you are looking for the word ―baptism‖ in the Old Testament, you may not find it.  
We are dealing with the subject of ―Pentecostalism – One Hundred Years,‖ and we are examining their claims. Their claims state that they ―received 
what they had on the day of Pentecost, the original article, the baptism of the Holy Spirit,‖ which we call in ―Bride‖ language, ―The Token,‖ which we call, ―the 
Fullness‖ or ―the outpouring of the Holy Spirit.‖ 1906 laid  claims  on  that  Article  and  said  that  they  received  that  Holy  Spirit  outpouring  as  on  the  day  of 
Pentecost. That claim has not changed in one hundred years but in a hundred years they have not manifested and borne the fruits to prove that their claim is right.

We proved that their claims are false by many infallible proofs on several  messages. We bare  witness that it was an outpouring of the Spirit;  we bare

Changed nature

―Why are you running, what happened to you?‖ He said, ―Jezebel is running after me. A woman is chasing me!‖ He had just killed four hundred prophets with 
the sword and brought down fire from heaven, but by the threat of a woman, that man ran! He even lost his vision and went up on the mountain. He said, ―Lord, 
Jezebel killed all the prophets and I only am left there.‖ The Lord said, ―Calm down, calm down. I have seven thousand reserved that have not bowed their feet 
unto Baal.‖ So one minute you could be anointed to bring fire from heaven, and then fear takes hold of your heart and you are running from  
the threat of a woman! 
That is how many of these Holy Ghost filled men are. They go, work signs and wonders on the platform and they raise the dead and everything but their 
wives are ruling them: baptism of the Holy Ghost without a changed nature. So the wife says, like Brother Branham said, ―John, you are not going out today!‖ 
―Yes, ma‘am!‖ Yes, that settles the issue. That fits preachers also, friend. All of these great powers of God, great men of God have their wives ruling them; there 
are all kinds of things in their lives. That is Mr. Ahab, the king with the baptism of the Holy Ghost, spirit-filled, anointed of God. His nature was not changed. 
Yes, he brought in idolatry. 
David: Let us take the lovely David, a man after God‘s own heart. If God had not had mercy upon him, He would have slain him. It was a time when all 
kings must go to battle but he intended to take it light, cool it. (II Samuel 11). He was cooling it and the old nature arose and he peeped over the banister. I don‘t 
know what he was looking for, he had five hundred wives! Instead of peeping at his wives, the man went peeping at a next man‘s wife bathing in the bathroom, 
and the old evil nature arose. He allowed the rope to get slack on that ―bad bull‖ over there; it came up upon him and he was captivated by his evil nature! He lost 
his shame.   
When you see that devil captivate you, you will lose your shame. You will go out and wear pants and walk in front of the church. You will walk with a 
woman  there.  You  will  commit  adultery  and  you  will  lose  your  shame!  My  God,  if  you  think  about  the  picture!  He  called  one  of his  servants,  a  bunch  of  his 
soldiers and said, ―Get that woman for me! Let me lay with her!‖  ―Have you lost all your shame? My God! You‘re a king! God loves you. You killed a giant, 
Goliath! You killed a giant, and here is a woman conquering you!‖   
That goes to show the power of that evil nature. ―Bring the woman.‖ ―But lord, that‘s Uriah‘s wife!‖ ―You need to obey the king when he speaks, 
otherwise you will lose your head!‖  Lust was speaking, overcoming a man.   
This man had a reputation of killing giants. This man had a reputation of escaping from Saul. This man had a reputation of making songs, killing a bear, 
killing a lion barehanded. Look at this evil nature rising and he was not alert, and because he was not alert, that old lustful evil nature came and captivated David 
in such a measure that he committed murder to hide his sin. That is the baptism of the Holy Spirit without a changed nature.   
[px]And he went out there; lost all his shame. All the guards around his throne, all the guards around the palace see this woman coming in, ―The king hath 
need of her.‖ They went in there to a bedroom, all the wives peeping there, five hundred wives, ―I wonder what he is up to?‖ They could not talk. He would take 
their heads off too! Lust overtook the man. He went into a bedroom.  He said, ―You keep guard; you keep guard here.  You keep guard and you keep guard here‖, 
without any shame whatsoever. He pregnated the woman and sends her back home.  Now the woman calls him on the telephone, (I mean, if they had any there!) 
She said, ―I am pregnant, what do we do here? The penalty for this sin is to be stoned to death!‖   
My  brother,  one  sin  leads  unto  the  next.  The  devil  jumped  on  David  now,  outside  of  the  Spirit,  outside  of  the  baptism  of the  Holy  Ghost;  the  Spirit 
departed from him. He did not lose his salvation but the Spirit departed, the Spirit of grace left him, and Satan had him in his hands. He said, ―My God, what am 
I going to do here? Everybody‘s going to know that I committed adultery! You know what to do, I think she had better abort this child! She better  ̳throw it 
away.‘ No, no, no, I want that child! I think the easiest thing to do...‖ (The devil gave him an interpretation.) ―...if the man dies, you are not a priest. You could 
marry the woman.‖ So he started to figure out now. Satan causes you to sin and then shows you a way to get out. Don‘t follow that pattern, brethren. The way is 
repentance.  
Don‘t commit fornication, get pregnant and then go and kill the baby. Repent for it. Don‘t commit adultery on your husband, cover it and then live with 
that  for  years. Repent  for the  thing! But  my point is  still that  baptism that  they received  in 1906 is the same article, exactly  the  same  article. You know  what 
David did? David wrote a letter. He had a man in the palm of his hand, his nephew called Joab, and he wrote, ―Listen to me, send down this fellow for me, Uriah; 
send him down here.‖ (He wants to cover this sin now, so he took the man from the battle.) David said, ―Go home and have a nice time, man. Spend a few days.‖ 
You know what kind of a sick thing that is? Big people. He wanted this man to go with his wife so the public would not know whose child that is, but Uriah was 
such a righteous man that he slept outside the palace somewhere there. He said, ―I cannot bear to know that Israel is in battle and here I am in my house with my 
wife. I won‘t do it.‖   
When he would not comply, the king wrote a letter and put it in his hands. It was his death warrant. ―Take this man, Uriah and put him in the heat of 
the battle.‖ Look at the scheme that the devil gives a man. He said, ―Don‘t let your hand be upon him. Don‘t let any Israelite kill this man. Put him in the heat of 
the battle that the sword of Ammon is going to kill him. So then I will be free (like Pilot) and I could wash my hands and say,  ̳None of the Israelites killed him; I 
never killed him. It‘s the enemy that killed him.‘‖ Scheme of the devil and that is going through the heart of a man that has the baptism of the Holy Spirit with an 
evil nature! You are talking about people could backslide and come down to shame and disgrace and find themselves in the Hall of Shame! What causes them to 
do that? Because they had the Old Testament article. That is why 1906 ministers found themselves in the Hall of Shame, even like Judas.   
He took the woman, married her and thought that his sins were covered.

[px]Nathan came across there (II Samuel 12) and said, ―King David, I have a little story to tell you. There was a man that had one little sheep in this country

Oh my, I tell you, David got angry! He said, ―I‘m still king in Israel. I‘m a righteous man! As the Lord liveth and as my soul liveth, that man shall surely 
die!‖ The prophet looked at David and said, ―Thou art the man, oh king! Uriah only had one wife and you have five hundred. You took the man‘s wife and killed

You talk about repentance. You are talking about a man that loved the Lord, my brothers and sisters. He said, ―Thou shall not surely die. You shall not

You  know  what  causes  people  not  to  repent? Pride down  in  the  heart.  But  we  need  to  repent  when  we  do  the  wrong  things.  Any  time  you  retaliate

[px]Jesus imparted Old Testament baptism to ministers 
[px]They manifested great gifts, great signs and great wonders but, friends, their natures were not changed. Now you take that and apply it to 1906; apply it 
to Luther; (you cannot go wrong) apply it to Wesley; apply it to Mr. Parham; apply it to the  man called Durham. He came up with another doctrine and broke 
Seymour‘s church; at the end of the three years, took almost all the believers and went down the road and opened another church.  Durham  did  that  and  left 
twenty people with Seymour. Yes, they had divisions. 
So that baptism of the Holy Spirit could be upon a man today and when they start committing sin, it moves away; but I will tell you something, friends, 
gifts and callings are without repentance. You could continue to manifest gifts but under the wrong spirit and because it is a gift of God, they could manifest by 
the Power of God just like Caiaphas. Now this is what has deceived so-called Pentecost. We see that all these people had the Holy Spirit. You search your Bible; 
you could preach from Genesis to Revelation and you could see that baptism of the Holy Ghost in the Old Testament.   
Something happened here now when Jesus arrived. I am saying that Jesus had the true article of the baptism of the Holy Spirit, but in Matthew 10, He 
imparted the same article of the Old Testament unto Judas, the eleven apostles and the seventy. Now what was He doing? He called common men: fishermen, tax 
collectors;  and  now  he  is  bringing  that  article  that  they  had  in  the  Old  Testament  to  the  congregation.  He  was  bringing  it  to common  people,  whereas  it  was 
reserved for priests, prophesiers, kings and prophets. Now He is bringing it out to the common fisherman. But brethren, though He brought it to them, that  was 
not the article of Pentecost because Pentecost had not yet come, therefore the Holy Ghost was not yet given out. So what was He doing there then in Matthew 10. 
Wasn‘t that the Holy Ghost that He was giving out? And then on the other hand, He said, ―The Holy Ghost is not yet given out.‖ You have to understand what 
He was speaking about. The article of Pentecost was not yet given out but the Old Testament article was being given out. That is why Zechariah could have it; 
Elizabeth could have it; John the Baptist could have it. That is the very same article. So now when Jesus gave them the article of the Old Testament, called the 
baptism, the anointing, the filling etc.  
In this case of Matthew 10, the Bible said,

[px]Matthew 10:1, former rain – acts 2, latter rain 
[px]Brethren,  I  am  saying  that  baptism  of  the  Holy  Ghost  opened  the  Red  Sea.  It  brought  ten  plagues  upon  Egypt.  Brethren,  that  anointing  in  Joshua 
stopped the sun and it stopped the moon at the same time. My God! You are talking about miracles, and signs and wonders that could be done by the baptism of 
the Old Testament! So now don‘t marvel and be deceived outside there on the field that because Pentecostalism produced signs, and wonders and miracles in a 
great  way,  and  think  means  that  they  returned  to  Pentecost.  No,  they  had  to  have  the  Word  of  God,  which  they  lacked.  The  apostles  worked  in  that  same 
anointing for three and a half years. They raised the dead; healed the sick; cast out demons, left and right; and it came to that certain place where they had to give 
up that anointing that they received in Matthew 10. They had to give that up. Shame on message ministers and believers who are influenced by the miracles of 
Benny Hinn.  
Now  I  will  tell  you something  here.  This  was  a  deeper  anointing  that  the  Church  had  in  that  time—miracles  and  signs  and  everything.  Israel  was 
backslidden and that sort of dwindled away; the Power of God dwindled away because of the backslidden Church. So when Jesus came He found the Church in a

Why was it a deeper anointing but the same power of the Old Testament? Brethren, when Jesus imparted to them that power in Matthew 10 that was the 
former rain. How do you mean former rain? Because it was a planting time, called the Moureh rain. It was the planting time. He sent them forth to preach the 
Word of God, precept upon precept, line upon line, here a little and there a little. Now when the former rain went out doing signs and wonders and miracles in 
that  way,  it  was  a  sign  that  the  Latter  Rain  was  about  to  come.  So  Matthew  10  was  the  baptism  of  the  Old  Testament,  but  with a  greater  anointing  under  the 
ministry of the Son of Man. Now that was the former rain. Understand, young men? Former rain, taken from the Hebrew word, Moureh rain. It means that there 
was a shower of rain that came down in spring for you to plant the seed. But then there was a harvest time and in the harvest time, heavier showers come, which 
is the Latter Rain. So that was your former rain going out and then the day of Pentecost was your Latter Rain. Your Latter Rain is the true article of Pentecost.

[px]PENTECOSTAL OUTPOURING NEVER CAME WITH REVIVALISTS NOR W.M. BRANHAM 
[px]Now, brethren, this is the great mystery in it. Even though that was the former rain, the Lord continued to use His people with the same Old Testament 
baptism just like He  used them in Matthew 10 because Judas had to be  made  manifest.  He could not give Judas the article of Pentecost and then take it away.  
No, so he allowed them to function. Oral Roberts functioned in the same Old Testament baptism. Billy Graham, T. L. Osborn, Tommy Hicks, A. A. Allen, Jack 
Coe and all those great evangelists.   
Now, can  you identify  these  people  in the  Old Testament by the  history that  we  read? Do you see their  mistakes? A. A. Allen  was arrested for drunk 
driving and died as an alcoholic. Oral Roberts became a money schemer—he said he had to raise eight million dollars or God will kill him!  We even see Jack 
Coe, being a convert of Brother Branham, had a lot of mistakes.   
Now some went in with the Lord, and some were actually Judases.  
Judas‘ spirit went after money, popularity and women. It showed them up by their fruits. By their fruits ye shall know them. So some went in with the Lord and 
some went to Hell. That‘s the truth of it. Under Jesus‘ former rain revival, some went to Hell and some went in with the Lord. Some went to the Upper Room. 
When the crowds did break down, only one hundred and twenty went to the Upper Room. Where are the multitudes today that follow Brother Branham?  Why 
are they not pressing to an outpouring of the Holy Spirit? So it is called ―the second wave.‖   
What they received under Brother Branham, the messenger, and under the messenger Jesus was the same article of the Old Testament; they received the 
same article of 1906, because Brother Branham did not come with the outpouring of the Holy Spirit, though he had the article of Pentecost like Jesus.  Under the 
ministry  of  Brother  Branham  there  came no outpouring of  the  Holy  Spirit  like the  Day  of  Pentecost.  That  is  why  he  constantly  called  the  people  back  to 
Pentecost because he knew that it did not come under his ministry. That compares with the ministry of John the Baptist, who said,  
Matthew 3:11 <I indeed baptize you with water unto repentance: but he that cometh after me is mightier than I, whose shoes I am not worthy to bear: 
he shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost, and with fire.>

[px]WELSH REVIVAL - YOUTH REVIVALIST EVAN ROBERTS 
[px]I read the story of the Welsh revival, and the man that was responsible for the Welsh revival was Evan Roberts. He never got married in his life, and he 
was  a  young  man.  He  is  the  youngest  revivalist  that  ever  arose,  and  he  arose  in  1903,  just  before  the  1906  revival,  which  actually,  that  revival  of  Wales 
influenced  the  1906  revival,  and  Evan  Roberts  of  Wales,  was  a  most  sincere young man, without a Pastor‘s guidance, without the Word to guide him, and 
beloved, there is a lot that we could learn here. He was born in a Methodist home, among Methodist family, and he had a desire in his heart, that the souls of men 
would be saved, he asked God for 100,000 souls and then he sought to reach God in many ways, and then one day his friend went to an evangelical meeting and 
heard a man called Joshua, and then that Joshua was praying that God raised up a man, a revivalist in Wales secretly and nobody knew, and brother Joshua, was a 
blessing to this friend of Evan, and he came home and told Evan that he received a blessing and has fully committed his life to the Lord, and immediately Evan 
started believing that he cannot receive the fullness of the Spirit, and if it comes to him, he would never accept it. 
 Satan put a fear upon this man. I hope none of you suffer that fear, that you would not receive the fullness, the Token. That is the Devil. It is an act of 
faith, brethren. Yes, it does not matter what  happens, repent and go on, never come to that conclusion. And that fellow started entertaining that thought and he 
[px]fell into depression immediately, and that triggered off something in the man, which will later destroy that great revival, after many years. He came to revival, he 
became a blessing, but that seed that the Devil placed in the young man‘s heart, eventually destroyed him.  
 In Wales he went out to Joshua, he heard Joshua for himself preaching, and Joshua loved souls, and Joshua prayed, and he used, the phrase, ―Lord bend 
them, bend them, bend them, bend them, Lord‖, in such agony, that brother prayed, and then that great agonizing fell upon Evan, and his prayer from that time on 
was, bend them, ―bend them, bend them, O Lord‖, and that man‘s whole life was absorbed into winning souls for the Lord, that he never even married. Not a 
stain on that fellow‘s life of adultery, and fornication. But then friends, one day his friend looked up into the moon and he seen a man‘s hand coming down from 
the moon over Wales, and then Evan asked him, ―What are you seeing?‖ He said, ―Look up‖, and then he seen the man‘s hand coming  from  the  moon,  over 
Wales, and when that happened, Evan‘s first meeting took place with just a few people, with that agonizing, and then he actually believed that God will have a 
revival break in Wales. That is the story of the Welsh revival. Remember, Brother Branham made reference to the welsh revival.  
[px]Quote W.M.B.: 128 It was said that some noblemen from the church went over to the Wales to understand, or figure out what all the mechanics was in 
the revival, during the Welsh revival. And when they got off the ship with their tall hats on, and their round collars; see come down the street, a little policeman, 
swinging his club around and around like that, whistling, they said, "My good man, could you tell me where the Welsh revival is?" 
He said, "Yes, my brethren; you're standing in the middle of it." He said, "You understand, I am the Welsh revival," said, "because the Welsh revival's in 
me." (Trying To Do God A Service Without It Being God's Will 65-1127b). 
[px]Oh my! So now that revival broke, and when it did Evans had these kinds of mind battles and he lived in fear brethren, and the great fear that the man 
lived in, was that the people will worship him. See how the Devil could work on your sincerity? He feared that the people will worship him. Through his revival 
the whole community was changed. The horses had to be retrained, because they were such sinners that they used to curse the horses, when they were driving the 
horses. So the horses were trained to curse words. They had to retrain the horses to Christian words now, in the community. So great a revival. Prostitute houses, 
became prayer houses. Such a mighty revival in Wales, and Evan was used for that. Within two years time, the whole of Wales had known Evan Roberts, and, it 
was a blessing to the entire nation of Wales. The revival broke amongst young people. Can you imagine something like that? God gave him 150,000 souls and 
Joshua sat under his ministry.  
 But  Evan,  he  suffered  with  that  kind  of  a  problem.  So  now  the  Devil  was  working  upon  this  mighty  revivalist.  Yes.  So  he  leaned  off  on feelings, he 
leaned off on sensations. Fear dominated him. Satan worked upon his sincerity. Yes. Number one; he feared that he would not get the Spirit of God, but he did 
get it. He feared that he would reject it. Okay. Then he feared that the people were going to worship him. He did not want to become popular. He wanted to be so 
humble,  that  they  came  to  take  his  picture  on  the  pulpit,  and  he  went  under  the  pulpit.  Such  a  humble  man,  a  young  man,  twenty-six  years  of  age,  when  that 
revival broke. He was called the boy preacher. You are talking about a handsome young man. Yes. He feared these things happened to him, and then he started to 
work in that revival and the revival got so big that it stretched overseas, it influenced different parts of the world, including India. 
 It  went into different nations. It influenced  Los  Angeles and California. Bartleman  was in contact  with Evan, asking him to come  there. But then, the

 So he worked so hard and had these things bothering him, and he only got three hours sleep at night, and he worked hard, and most of his time was spent

 You  see  all  the  preaching,  writing,  correspondences  and  office  work  that  I  am  doing  brethren,  and  ending  my  fortieth  year.  Some  of  you  are  very

[px]EVAN’S NERVOUS BREAKDOWN- DECIEVED BY A 
WOMAN PREACHER 
[px]Without the Word of God, hear what could happen to a man of God, and a great revivalist. It doesn‘t  matter  how  many  gifts  you  have,  how  many 
dreams, how many visions, you need the Word to guide you, and you need a Shepherd.  I picture that man. My heart was crying for him. I wished I was down 
there. I wish I could have been the pastor of that man. I would have never let him go that way. But it was not possible. The seals were not opened then. 
Hear what happened to this man. Some will never believe it. A woman preacher name Mrs. Penn-Lewis who was thrown out of Wales came there and 
started to advise Evan, and she took him, secretly, to England, saying that she will take care of his nervous problem. She took him to England where he would 
remain for eight years. All the members had to take care of themselves. Everything abroad had to take care of itself. And this woman was labeled by believers 
―jezebel‖! (She had a husband. Evan was not interested in her) she wanted to use him to build a reputation for herself, so she secretly took him, built a place for 
him, stole him away by a train into England and put him in her own house. Wales is near England.  
So he  abided there  as a sick  man, and could hardly  walk.  She  nursed and nourished him. Then he confided in that  woman counsel so  much  until she 
finally convinced him that the gift that he manifested, the supernatural that he manifested and the revival that he brought was not of God. Think of such a thing.  
That man was convinced. This magnifies the seals, this magnifies the Word of God, as our guidance. He had nobody to help him.  
[px]A woman preacher trapped him after such anointing, after such gifts, such manifestations, after such influence that shook even the whole of Wales; and 
even the Government. It went around the world. She finally convinced him that all that he done was of the devil. And she used his influence and caused him to 
write books under her name in order to regain her reputation, which was lost in Wales. He went on doing that for eight years. 
He stayed in England and his own father came from Wales to see him and he said, ―I am not interesting in blood relations. I am interested in the work of 
the Lord. And his father had to leave England without seeing him, and go back to Wales. When his father was dying and he heard that and went to see him. His 
father was a Methodist and he looked upon him with all the other relatives and he said, ―I forgave you son‖. That is a Christian spirit; ―I forgave you son‖. He 
went back to England and the old jezebel died. She was worse than a wealthy woman. 
 And do you know  what  happened? To see how God does things. Evan Roberts came  back to Wales,  after that  imprisonment,  for ten  years.  And little 
children  who  heard  of  that  revival,  and  grew  to  be  men,  longed  to  see  Evan  Roberts.  And  when  they  heard  that  Evan  Roberts  was back  in  Wales,  the  crowds 
started to gather, and there broke another phase of that revival, and they crowded to see who is this man called Roberts. ―We are happy to see you. We heard of 
your signs,  we heard of your wonders, we heard of your miracles,  we  heard of your name, but never seen you; just like  we long to see Brother Branham. And 
great crowds came to see Evan Roberts, who was not even married. But the devil worked upon his sincerity and humility. 
 And he went on preaching. You talk about crowds started coming, and he  was still healing the sick, his gifts never left him, and he  went on like that. 
And you know what  happened? His complex got a-hold of him that ―the crowds are building up again, and they will start to worship me.‖ You have got to be 
properly balanced. I don‘t have to live in fear of that. I have got to know my heart. But he did not have that understanding, and that poor fellow preached again 
for one year in Wales, and his revival started going around the country. And after that, it started going abroad again, and everybody was happy that Evan Roberts 
was back in Wales again. That complex overtook him, and he ran away into hiding, never to be seen in public again ministering. So he had all those thousands of 
people, and he ran into hiding, and he went there writing poems, contacting the ministers around the world, and influencing them about that revival.  
 And the sad thing is that, because of his absence from the public ministry, after some years, they could not find one trace of the Welsh revival, in Wales 
itself.  When  the  head  is  sick  the  whole  heart  is  faint.  That  fellow  went  down  in  history  as  the  revivalist  in  Wales,  but  that  was  the  end  of  the  Welsh  revival,

[px]I greet  all  saints  locally  and  worldwide,  those  at  G.C.C  (Grace  Convent  Church):  Pastor  Kenny  Mcgahee,  assistant  Pastor  Renner,  ministers  and 
congregation of the U.S.A., also Brother Watson, Brother Asserwathan, Brother Alexander and all saints in India, Africa, China, Germany, Philippines, St. Lucia, 
St. Vincent, Guyana and all those that are contending for E.O.D.H. books and for another outpouring of the baptism of the Spirit, just like they had it on the day 
of Pentecost according to Acts 2:1 and Joel 2:28. 
 I will like to use two scriptures to form a base for my testimony:  
 I John 1:7 <... if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship one with another, and the blood of Jesus Christ his Son cleanseth us from 
all sin.> 
There was a light for the Bride‘s day. There was a light for Luther‘s day, a light for Wesley‘s day, a light for Brother Branham‘s day or Pentecostal‘s 
day, and there is a light for the Bride‘s day. We are admonished by the scriptures to walk in the light as He is in the light. 
 Proverbs 4: 18 <...the path of the just is as the shining light, that shineth more and more unto the perfect day.> 
For Jesus said,  
John 8:12 <...I am the light of the world: he that followeth me shall not walk in darkness, but shall have the light of life.> 
 John said: 
John 1:8-9 <He was not that Light, but was sent to bear witness of that Light.  
That was the true Light, which lighteth every man that cometh into the world. >  
In James1: 17,  
James 1:17 <Every  good gift and every perfect gift is from  above, and cometh down from  the  Father of lights, with whom  is no variableness, neither 
shadow of turning.> 
Among us tonight and I have witnessed thirty years: there has been a good and perfect gift in operation among God‘s people in the form of His servant, 
Brother Dalton Bruce. No man is perfect but God sends good and perfect gifts. I sought for a man of God way back in Tobago, the land of my nativity in 1960‘s. 
 I  searched  every  radio  station:  Trinidad,  Netherlands,  Antilles,  Anguilla,  St.  Martin,  Quito,  Ecuador  etc.  I  turned  my  radio upside  down.  I  heard  the 
greatest preachers in the land, and around the world, great theologians and Bible scholars, but amongst them never a man spake like Dalton Bruce, for he speaks 
like one having authority.  
 The scriptures said that Jesus spoke not like the scribes or the Pharisees, but He spake like one having authority. The scriptures said: How knoweth this 
man letter, having never learned. How knoweth this man, Dalton Bruce letter, the Word, the revelation and the message, having never learned. God‘s servant has 
never been to college nor to university. 
[px]I believe he has the inspiration of the Holy Ghost to speak the words of life that  we have heard for the past years, without any error or contradiction. 
Job, the poet, said,  
 Job 32:8 <...there is a spirit in man: and the inspiration of the Almighty giveth them understanding.> 
God showed His servant a great big rock upon a hill, on a narrow road and told him in that experience when he heard the audible voice of the Lord, ―I 
will show you on the sides of the rock, I will show you on top of the rock and I will show you inside of the rock.‖ 
 I was looking for a man who knew the scriptures and knew what he is talking about. I never found that man in George Phillips, my first pastor. I never 
found that man in Ternel Joshua Nelson, my first presbyter, nor Jeremiah Prescott, my second presbyter, nor Marcus Roberts, my third presbyter; nor in Barker, 
Leebec, Alexander, Rayon, White or the whole host of them, in my time.  
 But when I came to Bethel, and sat and listened, I concluded that this is not man, but this is God. This is His Word, and this is what I had been searching 
for.  
Brother Bruce is the first preacher that troubled and interfered with my  
soul and gave me hope. He is not a quack. He has and knows God‘s plan and programme for the hour. He knows what it takes to save a soul.    
 I have seen him over the years, answer our questions, and sometimes when I think that he cannot handle this question and he is going to burst up on this 
one, I see the Lord comes and gives him the right answers, time and time again. The Bible says that the right answer cometh from the Lord.  
 Our pastor knows what he is about. He knows God‘s redemptive plan and program for the hour. He knows how to get a man born again and how  to 
prepare him to receive another outpouring of the Spirit like on the day of Pentecost. And that is why he has challenged the world over, and no one has yet  been 
able  to  take  up  the  challenge,  to  prove  him  wrong  on  what  he  teaches  in  the  Word  of  God.  He  has  our  full  support,  our  full  cooperation,  and  as  far  as I  am 
concerned, Brother Bruce is a man sent from God and he is able to face the oppositions and heresies of the enemy coming from all quarters today. 
 Brother Bruce was shown three men in a vision: Brother Branham was in the middle. And he was told, ―As your body is stiff upon this bed, so shall you 
walk with this man‘s message. And from since then, he has been walking straight with the message. He has never one day changed his  doctrine  and  he  has 
continued for all these decades to run a straight line on God‘s Word and the message of Brother Branham. God has shown him this message of William Branham 
and he has passed it on to us. He has not shunned to declare unto us the whole counsel of God. 
 I  am  here  because  God  brought  me  here  through  an  invitation  that was  given  to  Brother  Chandler  by  Brother  Jackson,  which  was  extended  to  me.  I 
thought  I  was  just  coming  to  that  meeting  and  move  on  to  the  evangelistic  field,  because  a  group  of  us  were  planning  to  go  through  the  Caribbean  and  South 
America. I held almost every position in the church. I was a preacher for ten years up until I came to Bethel. But God had better plans for me and for you. When 
I heard the Word of God the first time, I wanted to hear more. When I heard It the second time, I wanted to hear more, and continued to want more. And even up 
to now, I still want to hear more. I am never tired of hearing the Word of God.  
 When I came here, the first thing that the Word took away from me was my false water baptism. I subsequently got re-baptised in the name of the Lord 
Jesus Christ. I thought that  was all, but as I continued to sit under the Word, It took away my birth. That is what pushed me into desperation after Life, until I 
came to clear cut understanding on the Rock revelation of the Son of Man. 
 As I continued to follow on, the Word came and took away my Baptism of the Holy Ghost that I received in Pentecost. I lost my water baptism; I lost 
my new birth and my baptism of the Holy Ghost. And tonight, and I am contending for the genuine baptism of the Holy Ghost that the apostles received on the 
day of Pentecost, and I am going to receive it 
 I, Roy Barrow, a former Pentecostal for thirteen years: 1964 to1977, do solemnly and truly declare that this series of ten messages preached at U.S.A. 
and at Bethel, Trinidad, W.I., by our beloved pastor and shepherd, Dalton Bruce, on the commemoration of  one hundred years of Pentecostalism, is the truth, the 
whole truth and nothing but the truth.  
I  confirm,  fully  support  and  endorse  all  the  things  that  were  preached by God‘s servant on 100 years of Pentecostalism, to be true, for I was among 
them.  
The things that I am about to speak is not hear-say, nor did anyone prompt or asked me to say these things to pull down, castigate, criticize or degrade 
anyone, but these are the facts and my experiences. 
[px]I was born in Belle Garden, Zion Hill, Tobago. Five years after my conversion to Christianity, I migrated to the twin Island state of my country called 
Trinidad and lived at Abel Street, Diego Martin. Four years later I got married and lived at Church St. Petit Valley.  
In 1977, I came in contact with Brother Branham‘s message and seven years later I went to live in a place called Freeport, where the Word of God is 
preached in its purity by God‘s humble servant, Brother Dalton Bruce, and where the holiness standards of the message are highly upheld and kept by God‘s 
people. No television, no sports, No bath suits, no mixed bathing, no high heeled shoes, no immodest dressing etc.    
I can look back and say that I was not born in Mt. Zion by chance, nor did I live at Abel and Church Streets by coincidence, and neither am I living at 
Freeport by chance. Freeport is a free port indeed. It is the only place that I know of that had and still has the revelation that has set my sin sick soul free. Jesus 
said, ―Whom the son of man has set free, is free indeed.‖ The son of man came to seek and save that which was lost. 
In my Christian travel, the places that I lived, from Zion Hill to Freeport was ordered of the Lord. The footstep of the righteous are ordered of the Lord. 
My parents were Anglicans but my father leaned towards the Spiritual Baptist and Ethiopian Orthodox Faith. As a boy, I went to church and to Sunday 
school, where I was taught Bible stories and sang sacred songs and choruses. 
As I advanced in age and approached teenage life, I became wild, having my own way, disobedient, rude and rebellious. I obeyed my parents when they 
were around, but when they turned their backs, I would either go to play, or head to the sea, river or for the fields. I would go there for the rest of the afternoon, 
after school and for almost the  whole  day during the  close  of the  school term. I  was a  bad boy. I grumbled  when  my parents gave  me  instructions, but not for 
them to hear or see me fussing and rebelling against what I was told to do.  
I was such a disobedient boy that my parent would send my bigger brothers to catch me. They never could have caught me, and I always outran all of 
them. And if they happened to take hold of my shirt, I unbuttoned it so fast and left it in their hands. I was a leopard on my feet. I outran all my elder brothers. I 
don‘t know how I was not hung by some cocoa tree limb, badly injured or knocked down by vehicles in my escapes.  
In order for my mother to catch me to flog me, she acted nice with me  
and then grabbed me and let me have it. I got licks all in my head, because I was harden, but after a time, in order to flog me, they had to tie me with a rope while 
I was sleeping, wake me with blows and let me have it. Both parents used to beat me. 
I was a fearless teenager. I had loved to dance, go to cinema and I cursed a lot, but not in the hearing of my parents, or elder brothers. I stole like flies, 
meaning that anything my hands fell on was gone. People‘s fruits were in trouble with me. One time I stole my mother‘s brook lax, which is a laxative. I mistook 
it for chocolate bars and it gave me a purge of my life. The thing nearly killed me.  
I  was  such  a  naughty  teenager  that  anything  that  happened  in  my  village,  they  blamed  my  two  cousins,  Anva  and  Alston,  and  myself.  I  was  the 
ringleader. When you saw one you will see the others. I was such a terrible teenager that my father, on his dying bed, for days, prayed and cried out to God that 
he would change me. I don‘t know he saw what was coming for me, but looking back, all I could see was prison term after prison term, or possibly the hangman 
loose. 
One year after my father‘s death, a Pentecostal known as Brother Hensley Moore, came to live in the village, and he began to witness to me about how 
the Lord Jesus Christ came into the world, bled and died on he cross to save sinners. At the end of his witnessing to me, he asked me if I wanted to accept Christ 
as my Savior, and I said, ―Yes‖, and I meant it. From that time a dramatic and drastic change came over my life. It was two weeks after that I realized that I had 
stopped cursing I was a ―cuss bird‖, lying, stealing and being rebellious in such a way that I was amazed. The village was shocked and surprised and took note of 
the change that came into my life and was glad for me. 
I later got baptized in water in the titles of Father, Son and Holy Ghost at Goldsborough river Tobago, and where I continued to serve the Lord. I was 
told that the next step was for me to get filled with the baptism of the Holy Ghost.  
 I wanted the baptism of the Holy Ghost. I recall visiting the Scarborough church for the first time, where there was a white evangelist, an alter call was 
made for all those who wanted the baptism of the Holy Ghost. I went up, the evangelist laid his hands on me as I knelt at the altar and the anointing of the Spirit 
fell on me. I began to rejoice with great joy. As I prayed and waited, some grumblings and groanings came out of me (something almost like tongues) but that 
night I did not speak in tongues.  
[px] Shortly after, the man who we knew, in the Pentecostal circles, as the Holy Ghost man, Pastor Hector, came to Pembroke Tobago, and on a Friday night 
meeting he was tarrying with those who did not have the baptism of the Holy Ghost. 
 He told me, ―Just say,  ̳hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah. Say it faster, faster and faster‘‖, until an anointing  came  upon  me  and  I  began  to 
speak in tongues. From thereon I spoke in tongues, prayed in tongues, sang in tongues above  many youths my equal: and even the adults in my church, until I 
came to Bethel, where the Word took away my tongues and put it in its place. I never practiced speaking in tongues. I could speak in tongues but I am waiting on 
what Peter, James and John had. Pentecost is built upon tongues and not the genuine baptism of the Holy Ghost according to Acts 2:1 and I Corinthians 13. 
 As a Pentecostal, I was full of zeal, zest and impetus for Christ. I was hungry and thirsty for God. I wanted God to use me. I wanted every spiritual gift 
and I wanted to be used of God.  
As a young believer I ate God‘s Word, I memorised my scriptures and I was a ―praying mantis‖. When I prayed, you could have heard  me  in  the 
distance calling upon God and speaking in tongues like an automatic pistol. I hardly prayed without speaking in tongues. When that anointing came up me and I 
spoke in tongues, I used to feel way up in the Spirit, and I felt I could have taken on any devil, but it never worked. 
 I fasted but never for more than two to three days. I desired power to heal the sick and to cast out demons. I prayed and laid hands on the crippled and 
they  remained  crippled.  I  prayed  for  the  demon  possessed  and  they  remained  demon  possessed.  A  demon  possessed  man  form  Pembroke  who used  to drink  a 
large tin of tea and ate two to three bakes,  was prayed for and the  man continued to drink his tin of tea and ate his bakes. I knew of another demon-possessed 
case, when the evil spirit came upon that man, he became extremely strong.  
 On one occasion he ripped opened a bolted door and lifted up the back of a Bedford truck and was running through the village shouting and saying all 
kinds of things. They were prayed for and remained and died demon possessed. We still continued to claim the baptism of the Holy Ghost but it was not working 
like the one they received on the day of Pentecost. 
 As  a  Pentecostal,  I  was  not  ashamed  to  walk  the  streets  with  my  Bible,  distribute  tracts  and  witness  to  people.  As  long  as  there  was  a  gathering  of 
people, Brother Moore and I would grab the opportunity to speak to these people. We, along with one or two of the other men, spearheaded every crusade, which 
was  undertaken  by  my  church.  I  held  almost  every  position  in  the  church  and  I  was  a  fireball  for  God.  I  was  a  little  ram  skipping  on  the  mountain  for  God. I 
hardly knew what it was to be in the valley, except when I did wrong. But I quickly rose and was at it again. I never knew what it was to stay down. 
 As a young man, I would jump on my bicycle, ride to Speyside and Roxborough to preach to young people, and rode all those lonely roads back at 9:30 
–10:30,  all  by  myself,  in  the  night.  The  roads  were  so  dark  that  I  could  not  see  the  palm  of  my  hands.  As  a  young  boy  certain  fears  used  to  attack  you,  but  I 
pushed it back as I passed by the graveyards.  
  I attended many street meetings in the Leeward district of Tobago with a group of young men from the Scarborough church. After the street meetings, 
we ended up in the church and prayed all night.  
[px]EXPERIENCE 
[px]I recall one of my experiences that took place in one of the services. It was a Sunday morning, the meeting was so charged with the anointing of the 
Spirit that when I came from that meeting, I felt numb in my entire body, I felt air borne, I felt not on the earth. I was speaking to my brethren but I was in 
another sphere or a heavenly realm. In that sphere I felt serene, peaceful, sweet and holy with an awe upon me.  
I was a little fearful and scared. To bring myself out of that experience, I began to jump, and stamped my feet several times to snap out of it and to 
return to my normal feeling, but it still lingered for some time and then vanished away. 
[px]VISION 
[px]I recall one night as I knelt to pray on the side of my bed, I broke into a vision where I saw myself on a green plain, and out in the distance I saw a white 
horse galloping toward me with a rider and a sword hanging on his side. As the rider came closer to me, I recognized him to be the devil. He came off his white 
horse and tied his horse on a wooden rail. From the same direction, way in the distance, I saw the Lord Jesus Christ, the identical figure of the Hoffman‘s head, 
coming toward me. The devil was angered and pulled his sword. I became  fearful and fell on my knees. The devil started to charge  his sword at Jesus, and he 
walked right through that charging sword without any harm coming to him. At that stage I was still on my knees where he laid his hand on me and he appeared to 
be praying for me, within his heart, without words. 
  In the drama I opened my eyes to find out what was happening. Then I discovered it was a vision. I closed back my eyes to see if it would continue but I 
saw nothing. 
    Thank God for breaking the power of that white horse rider, the devil, in my life and for laying his hand upon my life and praying for me.  
 I heard men and woman spoke in all kinds of tongues, I heard interpretations of tongues. I heard men and woman agonized, and travailed and shouted in 
the spirit. I heard men and women prophesied. I also agonized, travailed and shouted in the Spirit. The usual prophecy was, ―The Lord is coming soon and we 
must be prepared to meet Him.‖ 
[px]TONGUES 
[px]One  of  the  things  that  amazed  and  baffled  me as  a  young  believer  was  a  brother  by  the  name  of  Brother  Caruth  who  spoke  in  a  powerful  unknown 
tongue. He used to vibrate and shake down the place with froth on both sides of his mouth and spittle flying all over the place. But I came to find out that he was 
living in fornication with an unsaved woman. That troubled me until I came to the message, where we were taught that the rain falleth on the just and unjust. Sad 
to say, this brother, when he was exposed for his sin, lost his mind. In his insane state, at times, he claimed to be God, and other times he claimed to be St. Paul, 
and he said I was Timothy, but I never believe him to be Paul, much more for him being God. He ended up in the mental asylum. 
[px]PASTORS’ ADULTERY 
[px]I knew of pastors living in adultery and still speaking in tongues. I knew of a good minister friend of mine whose wife was living in adultery with his 
fellow minister friend. That minister still preaches the gospel and has a big church in the city of Port of Spain. He still lives that adulterous life, speak in tongues 
like an automatic pistol and now claims to have tremendous healings and supernatural signs and wonder in his ministry. 
 He groans and behaves as a hog in his preaching and when praying for the sick. I know that he is demon possessed. It is not now he is an adulterer. He 
has been so for quite sometime.  
 You cannot preach, groan, agonize and travail in the Spirit like him. He has a silver tongue and is full with a lot of drama in his preaching, but he is a 
stinking, nasty, filthy adulterer. It always baffled me how a man could be filled with the Holy Spirit and live such an unholy life. How a man could live such life 
[px]and  still  stand  behind  the  sacred  desk  and  talk  about  God,  and  look  right  in  the  faces  of  the  women  with  whom  he  committed  the  act.  It  is  beyond  me.  Such 
ministers have more guts than a calabash. Such ministers ought to step down.   
 My minister friend had to run from this country with his wife to get away from this other minister that used to live with his wife. I witnessed for myself 
my minister friend‘s wife‘s face and hands used to be blue and black from blows that he used to put on her, and the minister and this woman claimed to have had 
the Baptism of the Holy Ghost. This minister always says that ―God has a miracle for you with your name written on it.‖ A bunch of devils! I cannot be such a 
hypocrite and claim that God is using me to heal the sick and cast out demons. You are a lair, you are living a false life and you are a make believer. Hell is too 
good for you! Repent or perish! 
I knew of a minister who had no children with his wife, who went out and committed adultery and had a child outside of his wife. And is still pastoring 
and claim to have the baptism of the Spirit and is still speaking in tongues. He was one of the first pastors in Roxborough, Tobago. Is this the experience of Acts 
2:1-4? No! It is what they received at Azusa Street. It‘s the rain falling on the just and unjust. What the apostles received in Acts 2: 1-4, they  never  went and 
committed fornication and adultery with it. No man could have charged them with such sexual sins, for they were built-up right and they had the genuine baptism 
of the Holy Spirit. (Joel 2:28). 
 I now understand what it means for the rain to fall on the just and the unjust, and power apart form Christlike character is satanic. What they received at 
Azusa Street was power apart from Christlike character. That is why they could have gone out and committed fornication, adultery, sexual perversions and pulled 
for money with it. But what they received in Acts 2:1-4 was genuine and they could not have lived such wicked lives with it.    
 I knew of a case in Charlotville, that  my pastor at Pembroke had the oversight,  where a brother and sister got married in the spirit. This couple, along 
with others, used to shut away  in the  church and pray a  lot. This  woman and this  man claimed that  they  were  married in the  spirit. ―The Lord joins together.‖ 
They used to speak in  tongues, claimed to  have the  baptism of the  Holy  Ghost and  went out and started  to live  in  fornication and claimed they  were  married. 
They quoted the scriptures, ―What therefore God hath joined together, let not man put asunder.‖ That was fornication, that was lust that came over that couple. 
    I knew of Brother Barber from the  Diego Martin church.  He  used to speak  in all  kinds  of tongues. He  left his  wife  and  went out and  was living  with 
another woman. He fell sick and before his death his brethren encouraged him to repent and make his life right, which he reluctantly did and went back home. 
[px]EARLY PENTECOSTALISM – HOLINESS STANDARDS 
[px] In the early Pentecostal days, you could not be living in sin and coming to church. You would have been put out or stopped at the door. The ministers 
now, have no shame. They beg for money like shameless dogs. They rob the poor people of their little money that they have to go by. They will make you empty 
your pockets and put your travelling money in the offering. 
 Pentecost taught us that John the Baptist was the last prophet and quoted Hebrews 1:1, and, ―The law and the prophets were until John.‖ (Luke 16:16). If 
the  last  prophet  was  John,  then  who  were  Jesus  and  the  prophets  in  the  early  church  like  Agabus?  Pentecostal  ministers  condemned  Brother  Branham  as  a 
prophet and preached him down as a false prophet and said that he went out of his mind. Brother Branham was God‘s prophet of the hour. He was Malachi 4:5-6, 
Revelation 10: 7, Revelation  3:14-22 and Matthew 17: 11. They,  who condemned him, now claim to be  apostles and prophets.  But they are  false  apostles and 
false prophets. 
 I knew of a pathetic case in my church where the senior deacon fell sick and his wife wanted to take him to the obeah man (Soothsayer). He was against 
it  but  it  appeared  that  he  began  to  give  in  to  his  wife. He  being  sick,  his  wife  a  Pentecostal,  was  pushing  him  to  go  to  the  obeah  man,  because  she  believed 
somebody did him something. Everything the brother ate he just kept  
passing it out.  
[px] I stood up against the sister wanting to take her husband to the obeah man and she lambasted me and called me all kinds of filthy names but I stood my 
grounds. The brother lost his mind and ended up in the mental home, where he was treated and recovered. He was my best friend. This brother worked hard and 
fasted a lot and did not eat the way he ought to, and he hardly took vitamins, which resulted in him falling ill.  
The women in Pentecost never practised mixed bathing, never wore swimsuits and bikinis and never wore immodest clothing. They wore full dresses, 
skirts and bodices. You could not have seen the impression of their underclothing, but now it is a beauty show, it is a circus. You can see the impression of the 
women‘s underclothing on the outside. No reason to doubt that‘s why the ministers and lay members are falling in so much fornication and adultery. 
 In my early Pentecostal days a woman could not wear jewellery, never straightened their hair, never wore lipsticks and painted their faces. The women 
could not wear pants, coulette and slacks. They hardly wore gold, except a ring, if they were married.   
I saw woman slain by the Holy Ghost, fell down on the floor, their clothes lifted up where their underclothing were exposed, and men and women had 
to cover them with sheets. If that was the Holy Ghost, it would have kept their clothes down and not exposed their underclothing. It is a rude ghost. After they 
were slain, they were embarrassed to know they were rudely exposed like that.   
In 1964, my life was miraculously, supernaturally and dramatically spun around. I lost taste for dancing that I had loved very much, for partying and for 
carnival, which is a National Festival that takes place in this country for two days annually. I lost taste for calypso music, country and western and sentimental 
songs, and all worldly music. I stopped going to cinemas. I stop chasing girls and I began living for Christ. 
As a Pentecostal I attended almost every service, which was five times a week, plus other departmental meetings. In those days, I walked three miles to 
church and back with some of the brethren. As we walked those lonely roads, we sang those sacred songs and choruses, bubbling with joy and great happiness. I 
cannot forget those days. They were some of the best days in my life. 
Beloved the Pentecostal world has perverted all those sacred songs and have brought calypso, rock, soca and dub into the church to see if they can win 
the world. You cannot win the world like that. The world has to adjust to suit the Word, and not the church adjusting to suit the world. This is the reason why the 
world has gotten into the church, and you cannot make out or distinguish whether it is a worldly song or a sacred song that is being sung. 
I am against all these  worldly music that  Pentecost  has brought  into  the church. They  have  desecrated the  Holy songs and  have put all these  worldly 
beats to them.  
 In my church, the week was filled with all kinds of activities. There  
was hardly a day in the week without some kind of activity. On Sunday I taught a Sunday school class in the morning. Two Sunday school classes in the evening, 
and together with that, hit the streets for open air meeting, before attending the evangelistic service in my church for 7: 00 pm. I was a  workhorse in Pentecost 
thinking I was fulfilling the great commission of Matthew 28-16.   
 One of the hallmarks in my Christian experience is that I can vividly remember when the burden and the load of sin were rolled away from my life as I 
surrendered my life to Christ. From thereon I experienced a peace, a joy and a happiness that I never had. I knew when my fetters, my chains and the shackles of 
sins were broken in my life and the prison in which Satan held me swung opened and I was set free.  
 I knew when the load and the burden of sin left me as I wept and looked away to the one dying on the cross for me. I felt like tons rolled off of my back, 
I felt light and I felt when the weight of sin was lifted from my life.   
Jesus in Matthew 11: 28 said, <Come unto me, all ye that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.>  
My  village  was  glad  when  they  heard  of  my  change  and  that  I  was  living  for  Christ.  After  which  I  was  invited  by  Brother  Moore to  a  service  at 
Pembroke Tobago and from that time have not turned back to my vomit, like a dog and wallowing in the mire and mud like a hog.   
Azusa Street was not a return of Acts 2: 1-4, but a restoration on the gifts. 
I  said  all  that  to  say  this:  Just  before  I  came  to  Christ,  Brother  Moore  started  speaking  to  me  about  accepting  Christ as  my  saviour,  and  this  night  in 
particular, I dressed up and went to dance, and all of a sudden the music meant nothing to me, and as if it was way in a distance. I left the dance and I went home 
without missing anything. I felt something like a hush, a calm or peace come over me. One day I was sent by my mother for something and on my returning, I 
felt something came upon me and reminded me: ―You stopped cursing‖, and I felt so good, so happy and a joy came over me and strengthened me to go on. 
[px]I heard and seen Arturo Skinner, Oswald Davis and Judith Brown. Later, the televangelist Benny Hinn. They all make a mockery of the discerning of 
spirits. They always make mistakes and blunders as they try to tell people their sick conditions, and it is not so. They are a bunch of quacks and impersonators of 
Brother Branham who discerned the hearts and lives of the people for many years and never one day made one blunder in his discernment. Check his books and 
tapes. None of his discernment ever failed.  
We are not going to settle for any shakes, quakes and quivers. We are not going for tongues, which is the least of all spiritual gifts. We want the genuine 
Holy Ghost baptism like Peter, James and John and the church at Pentecost. We want the same signs, the same wonders and same miracles, and added to that, a 
speak the word creative ministry. In Jude1: 3, Jude exhorted that <ye should earnestly contend for the faith which was once delivered unto the saints.>  
 In  Ezekiel  47:  1-5,  there  are  four  measurements  of  water. There  was  an  ankle  measurement,  a  feet  measurement,  a  loins  measurement  and  an 
overflowing measurement.  Luther, by the  Revelation of the just shall live by faith, received the ankle  measurement of the  Spirit. Wesley, by the  Revelation of 
living a sanctified and holy life, received the feet measurement of the Spirit. 
1906 Pentecostalism, by the outpouring of the Spirit and restoration of the gifts of the Spirit, received the loins measurement of the Spirit. The Bride, by 
the revelation of Christ, will receive the overflowing measurement of the Spirit, the river of the baptism of the Holy Ghost, to swim in and display such power as 
the world has never seen, then go away in the rapture. 
There is much more power in here, than Moses used to open the Red Sea. There is much more power in here, than Joshua used to open the Jordan. There 
is  much  more  power  in  here,  than  Joshua  used  to  stop  the  sun  in  its  track.  There  is  much  more  power  in  here,  than  what  created  the  sun,  moon  and  the  great 
galaxies. There is such power in here that can roll worlds outside there and you can go and live upon them. The power that is in here can give a man eternal life, 
where you cannot die, just as God cannot die. There is a power in here that can change your evil nature, your sinful appetites and desires for sin. There is a power 
in this service that can give you the new birth and eternal life and can change you from within and without, where you will not have any desires for sin. There is a 
power in here to make you a Son of God and give you the power of the baptism of the Holy Ghost. Amen!     
[px]GERALD RENNER - MINISTER & RETIRED ACCOUNTANT 
[px]Acts 2:1-4 <And when the day of Pentecost was fully come, they were all with one accord in one place. And suddenly there came a sound from heaven 
as of a rushing mighty wind, and it filled all the house where they were sitting.  
And there appeared unto them cloven tongues like as of fire, and it sat upon each of them.  
And they were all filled with the Holy Ghost, and began to speak with other tongues, as the Spirit gave them utterance.> 
I am Associate Pastor here at Grace Covenant Church in Middletown, Connecticut U.S.A.  I was born in October, 1934 in a small farming community in 
south central Florida.  My first recollections of religion, church going and Pentecostalism begin in the late 1930s when I was but a small child.   
I have come not to preach but to relate some of my experiences and also some of the things that my wife, Norma, remembers.  Some of our experiences 
are related for the benefit of people who may hear by tape or see the videos or who may read the book, ―Pentecostalism—100 Years, in which The 1906 Revival 
is compared to True Pentecost.‖   
Brother Dalton Bruce has abundantly proven, both by the Holy Scriptures, the message of the prophet/messenger of Malachi 4:5-6, William Marrion 
Branham, and the history of the Pentecostal movement over the last one hundred years, that the 1906 Azusa Street revival that resulted in an Outpouring of the 
Holy Ghost, said to be a return of Pentecost, was based upon a faulty doctrinal foundation that was established by men who, themselves, were not in ―one 
accord,‖ and some of whom were in an apostate condition.  True, some of the men were sincere, God-fearing and devout and God honored their sincerity and 
honesty.  Nevertheless, the manifestations, or lack of certain manifestations in the 1906 revival make it evident that the outpouring was not that which we expect 
and that which is required to prepare the end-time Bride of Christ to be taken up from the earth in the ―Rapture of the Saints.‖  The end-time Bride of Christ must 
[px]be prepared by a return of True Pentecost.  Therefore, the true return to the Pentecost of the time of the Apostles is yet before us.  We seek It and we expect It 
with all our hearts. 
Our experiences illustrate the extent to which the Pentecostal organizations have strayed from Holiness Standards without which no man shall see the 
Lord.  (Hebrews 12:14)  (Much less, go in the rapture.)  I will speak particularly about the organization called ―The Church of God,‖ which, I believe, is similar 
in most respects to ―The Assemblies of God,‖ ―The Pentecostal Holiness Church‖ and other denominational churches.  There are also many independent 
congregations that are similar in their doctrine.  I will also mention some experiences in a ―Jesus‘ Name‖ church whose pastor was a member of the International 
Ministerial Association (―IMA‖) and whose doctrine is similar to that of the ―United Pentecostal Church,‖ that is, they baptize in water in Jesus‘ Name—not 
triune titles of Father, Son and Holy Ghost.  Otherwise, outside of the baptism, the ―Jesus Name‖ groups seem similar to the Trinitarian Pentecostal 
organizations. 
My recollections begin around 1938 or 1939 in the Church of God congregation that was located in Arcadia, Florida, a small farming and cattle-raising 
area in south central Florida.  This was only thirty-two or thirty-three years after the beginning of the 1906 Azusa Street revival.  I recall the strong, powerful 
preaching but not what was said.   But I can remember some of the manifestations that preaching brought of ―tongues,‖ most of it unknown tongues.  Of course, 
the only tongue I knew was English and not very much of that.  But there were ―tongues‖ and ―interpretations,‖ shouting, dancing in the aisles and crying and 
repenting—and some falling over the seats.  And I can remember, as a small child, sometimes we would sleep under the seats and when some of this began to 
happen, we small ones would cower under the seats in fear that we might get stepped on. 
I will be referring to ―pastors‖ and ―teachers‖ and ―evangelists.‖  I don‘t refer to them in the sense that these are part of the five-fold ministry.  That has 
not been set in order.  But those terms are the terms that were used in the churches that we attended over the years.  They called the people, ―pastors‖ and 
―evangelists‖ and ―teachers,‖ ―overseers,‖ etc. 
HOLINESS STANDARDS 
[px]The Church of God organization originally subscribed to very high and strict standards of holy living including: modest dress with long sleeves for 
women.  ―Long sleeves‖ became a controversy: ―Does that mean a full length down to your wrist or does that mean a three-quarter length sleeve, half way down 
from your elbow?‖  As time went on it became elbow-length sleeves and still later it became half way to the elbow from the shoulder.  And then it went further 
than that.   
Those standards included no jewellery—not even a wedding band; watches with decorative bands were frowned upon.  Normally, if a man wore a wrist 
watch, it would have a plain leather or cloth band.  Nothing fancy at all.  It was there for utility, not for looks.  Women were not to wear pants, even at home, no 
drinking of coffee or soda drinks (like Coke or Pepsi Cola), no lipstick or make-up and no cutting of women‘s hair, no smoking or use of alcoholic drinks.  
―Divorce‖ was considered a dirty word.  Adultery and fornication were strictly forbidden.  There was to be no mixed bathing.  Breaking of some of these rules 
could be cause to be ―turned out‖ (that is, dismissed) from the church.  Tithe paying was taught and expected as were fasting and daily prayer.  People who broke 
these rules were considered to be in a ―backslidden‖ condition and, in the absence of repentance, were considered ―lost.‖ 
[px]BASIC DOCTRINAL TEACHINGS 
[px]The organization taught, and we heard this from Brother Bruce concerning the early Pentecostal fathers, when he talked about Mr. Parham, Mr. 
Seymour and others who subscribed basically to the same doctrines.  The organization taught, as did Charles Parham a generation earlier, three distinct works of 
Grace: Justification, Sanctification and the Baptism with the Holy Ghost.  Speaking in other tongues was the ―initial evidence‖ of the Baptism of the Holy Ghost 
in a person.  They also believed in the pre-millennial rapture of the saints.  They also taught a Trinitarian form of water baptism by immersion (―according to 
Matthew 28:19‖ which we just read).  And they allowed and ordained women as preachers. 
Now, the baptism was immersion in water but the formula, the thing that was said over the people, was according to Matthew 28:19.  The belief was 
stated, as I heard many times, that they would rather baptize the way Jesus taught than the way Peter said it should be done.  Of course, they forget that Peter 
was the one with the keys to the Kingdom.  Also, most of them do not realize that the ―Kingdom‖ was the Baptism of the Holy Ghost.  
They had a lot of rules, a lot of strict standards, but rules and standards do not guarantee adherence either to the letter or the spirit of the rules.  By the 
early 1940s, the Arcadia pastor had begun to favor certain younger sisters and would not be corrected.  I do not recall the specifics of what was going on but my 
parents, because of this, being greatly disturbed and grieved by the situation, left the church but they began to drift spiritually.  In late 1944 or early 1945, the 
U.S. we moved to Miami.  Around that time, we, as a family visited a local revival where we met my future wife, Norma, and her family.  I was about ten years 
old at that time.  We moved back to the farm for a period of one year in 1946/47.  Farming was difficult and costly the weather was bad, my dad lost all the 
money that he had saved previously trying to farm and we had to go back to Miami. 
[px]ATTENDED BROTHER BRANHAM’S MEETINGS 
[px]In February 1948, our family attended the meetings of a boy preacher, called ―Little David‖ Walker and also Brother William Marrion Branham.  After 
Little David preached, Brother Branham gave a fifteen or twenty minute faith-building sermon and then called a healing line.  I think we were there every night.
