control that the helpers had much difficulty to keep order. In rage and vexation they roughed up some people. The lines were long and everybody that attended 
the convention was asked to pass through the lines. With all that noise and confusion there is no power. No miracles or healing were taking place. 
 We took a sister from Trinidad on a wheelchair to the convention and we brought her back the same way. 
 I did not see any visible manifestation of healings or miracle, though they claimed that the dead were raised and the crippled were coming out of their 
wheelchairs.  
 I was part of that revival. I did believe back then that it was a true move of God and I supported and defended that revival until I was delivered. 
 When I was in Florida in 1985, the half an hour silence was a big subject. 
 In 1986 the emphasis was on filling and refilling. Those who were filled the night before had to come the next day for a refilling. 
[px]WORLIDNESS & UNHOLINESS ACCOMPANIED  NEW YORK THUNDERS, SEALING REVIVAL 
[px] Worldliness took over the convention. In fact, the New York church is a very worldly church. It was nicknamed the Corinthian church in the message.  
 We were shocked to see the pastor‘s wife and daughter in such high heels, tight dresses, and people in the church who were members with makeup on 
their faces. 
 In the plain message, up to that time, we had a higher standard of holiness, although we did not have the revelation of the son of man. 
 Being surprised by what we saw, we put in a question about the heels, dressing and makeup. The answer from the ministry was that ―Trinidadians are a 
fast and inquisitive people; we do not like too many questions around here. What you see here, what you hear here, when you leave here, leave it right here!!!‖ 
Their favourite quotation was, ―Here in New York, we are not on legalism.‖ 
 The lifestyles of the believers at home is another story. It was no big deal to see a sister come out with a nightie to serve coffee and sandwiches.  We 
never  saw  that  in  Trinidad.  They  put  on  their television and watched ―Sex in the City‖, wrestling and whatever was showing. Even the children looked at 
anything. 
 Another sister was wearing lipstick. She said that her job allows her to wear that. She was an airhostess.  
 Something is wrong. A Christian man and woman have to make a better stand than that. Sometimes it may mean you have to leave a certain job. Amen. 
 When they take you out they visit all types of places, even saying  
―When you are in Rome you do as the Romans do.‖ 
[px] At first, we regarded the New York church as the most spiritual church in the message. We knew that pastor Coleman was ordained by Brother Branham 
and therefore allowed ourselves to be indoctrinated by him, and that the black man being the most spiritual man, we actually believed that he was the man of the 
hour. Yes. 
The worldliness got us upset at first, but as time went by we started adjusting to the worldliness. When I came back to Trinidad the Port-of-Spain pastor 
called me up to a meeting. He discussed certain things with me. Then he came down to Cedros and had a meeting with the entire church. In that meeting he made 
it clear that the sisters could wear any size of heels except spike heels, we could have television and sports etc. Certain sisters from the Cedros church responded 
very well. 
 I  was  influenced  and  I  passed  on  that  influence  to  the  church  and  just  like  New York  and  Port-of-Spain,  we  started  saying  that  we  did  not  believe  in 
legalism. 
 I am saying this to show how the influence of one you trust as a servant of God could fall upon another minister and his congregation. I believe that the 
influence of the pastor of the Christian Assembly in New York contaminated a lot of believers worldwide. 
 Now that we were in Trinidad, fresh from the convention where we received the ―seal of God‖, we had our own three days of meetings where all the 
groups  that  associated  with Pastor  Coleman  came  together  so  the  believers  could  receive  the  seal  of  God.  The  same  things  that  happened  in  New  York  and 
Pennsylvania happened here in Trinidad. As they laid hands on the people they fell to the ground, they were  slain, they rolled, they screamed, they clashed on 
each other etc. 
[px]UNHOLY MANIFESTATIONS & FANATICISMS 
[px] An outstanding case was a sister who could not be controlled in the song service. She would pull up her dress to her waistline, and the deacons would 
quickly pull it down. Her behaviour got one of the deacons so mad that he pulled off his belt from his waist and strapped her down to the bench of the church. 
She tried to resist but he tightened the belt and kept her under control. The song leader said that he thank God that the sealing angel had started sealing the people 
already. 
 The brethren went off into fanaticism. The people started seeing all kinds of supernatural things appearing to them: ―the cloud with the face of Jesus, 
the pillar of fire, the rainbow, and some even saw written messages in the sky.‖ The pillar of fire was as common as the sunrise every morning. 
 I don‘t say this to make a joke: we were all in church one night when we heard a loud scream outside the church. Someone said a sister just saw a pillar 
of  fire  and  it  is  there  right  now.  We  rushed  out  only  to  find  a  fire-fighter  truck  with  the  red  light  revolving  and  blinking.  They  had  become  so  fanatical    that 
everything was spiritualised.  
[px]BACKSLIDINGS 
[px]That fanaticism went on for a while until the people started backsliding. I called the minister in Port-of-Spain and told him that many of the people in 
Cedros who received the ―seal‖ were backsliding. He said that the same thing was happening there in Port-of-Spain.  
Something is wrong with that kind of seal. The Bible said, ―We are sealed until the day of our redemption.‖ The seal is supposed to keep you. That seal 
had no keeping power. 
I asked that pastor for an explanation and he said that he did not know, but he would call New York to find out. He called New York and they said that 
the same thing was happening there. He told me that his assistant minister backslid.  
[px]The  Port-of-Spain pastor said, ―Maybe some of the people were not truly sanctified‖. I told him that was strange because we were saying from the 
pulpit, ―nineteen were sealed tonight, and forty were sealed Sunday.‖ How could we take back our word now, and say differently. 
The ministry among us then had sanctioned the seal. The people who were ―sealed‖ were giving testimonies of their experiences. Some had tremendous 
experiences and manifestations. One sister said that she became so desperate for the seal that she told the Lord she was not moving until she got it and she did. 
Another said as she looked up she saw her name  written in the sky,  with these words, ―You will be sealed on such date‖ and she did received the seal on that 
date. 
 The pastor‘s wife told me personally that since her son received his sealing they were not having any trouble with him again. It was not long after that 
her son backslid and left the church. 
 It  was  as  though  Sodom  and  Gomorrah  had taken  over the  assemblies.  It  affected  the  unity  between  us  ministers  that  we  started  to  go  our  separate 
ways. That is when I started accepting invitations to preach in other places like Bethlehem Tabernacle etc. 
 This was a junction in my life where I was really confused and started searching the prophet‘s words for logical explanations on a number of issues. 
 I started preaching that ―The shout was the prophet, the voice is the Bride, and the trumpet – dead saints. The seven thunders is not something to preach 
but a manifestation.‖ 
 I  realized  in  my  own  life  that  I  was  as  powerless  as  a  doornail  and  started  doubting  my  sealing.  Although  I  believed  and  experienced  falling  to  the 
ground, there was this question: ―Why are we so powerless?‖ We tried to manufacture something by fasting for three days but there simply was no power. No 
miracles were taking place to accompany this great ―sealing revival.‖ 
 I am saying today that that ―seven thunders revival‖ has proven itself to be of the devil. In a nutshell, the manifestation is the interpretation. 
 Sometime ago I met this pastor and we were discussing some of these things. I reminded him of the banner they brought to Cedros written, ―Charity, the 
Headstone is here.‖ Concerning the incident about the sister who was strapped to the bench in the church, I confirmed to him, as a witness. I asked him on the 
phone about the people who were sealed with the ―true baptism of the Holy Ghost‖, ―how is it that they backslid?‖ He could not answer. Then he said, ―Maybe 
we were not referring to the true baptism of the Holy Ghost. Probably it was about the many fillings.‖ I said, ―No, the banner  was  not  saying  Charity,  the 
headstone is coming, but Charity, the Headstone is here. 
 Brother, the Lord so allowed it. I had taken some pictures and on one of the pictures the banner came out plain: ―Charity, the headstone is here.‖ I said, 
―Look at that‖, and he said, ―But, it is true.‖ I said, ―Of course it is true.‖ He then said, ―In life, you have many experiences. That was a phase we went through. 
We have revived ourselves and we are moving on.‖ I said, ―I myself am moving on.‖ 
 That was of the devil! Anybody who has to move on from that must confess that was of the devil. We denounced it and started over afresh.  
 You just can‘t say, that was a bad phase, and continue to serve the Lord. It doesn‘t work so. You have to confess that that ―seven thunders, seventh seal 
revival‖ was of the devil and not of God. When you confess that, you then accept truth to move on. 
 Thank God, that many years ago I confessed that it was of the devil. When truth came my way, I received truth and I moved on. I am moving on by the 
grace of God. 
[px]DELIVERANCE PASSED OUR WAY 
[px] I give  God thanks and praise for His servant  who  had passed our way at  Point Fortin and Cedros. We  give  God thanks and praise.  What  would have 
happened to my mind if I had stayed with that revival? Probably I would have gotten a nervous breakdown. 
 I give God special thanks for His servant who passed our way, and preached the revelation of the son of man that delivered me and those of Christian 
Assembly in Cedros, who wanted truth. 
[px]   When  we  heard  truth,  the  Words  of  Life,  the  revelation  of  the  son  of  man,  we  came  out  realizing,  ―Here  is  a  man  truly  preaching  the  holiness 
message.‖ 
 One of the outstanding things back there  when Brother Bruce came was his first message,  ̳I was not Disobedient to the Heavenly Vision.‘ I had never 
met a man in the message who met the pillar of fire face to face and heard the audible voice of God. Today, every dog and cat in the message is making claims. 
 Since we came across this what we now believe, the people are so satisfied, they have a revelation in their heart, they know where they are at now and 
where they are going. 
 The plan of salvation is so clear to us. We know what we believe and what we have to receive. 
 Together with the church from Point Fortin, I thank God for His marvellous and wonderful servant, Brother Dalton Bruce. We always wanted to go right 
but we were deceived. May God again bless His servant, strengthen and anoint him as he leads us to the true outpouring of the Holy Ghost. 
 Through this series of meetings on ―Pentecostalism – One hundred years‖, such a burden came in my heart for some Mexican people who I met in 
Texas. They are a lovely bunch of people who are trying to uphold the standards of the plain message. My heart‘s desire for them  is  that  what  we  have  been 
hearing can somehow be translated in Spanish that they can be blessed also. May the Lord bring it to pass is my prayer.  
[px]GARY KELLMAN – MINISTER & BUILDING CONTRACTOR 
[px]I was born in Guyana. In the year 1977, on the 12
th
 of June at the age of 16, I gave my heart to the Lord. I remember going up to the altar and repenting 
for my sins as they rolled through my mind. A great weight was lifted from my shoulders and I cried all day thinking of Calvary. I was then told that I must visit 
converts  or  baptismal  classes  which  lasted  for  about  six  weeks.  Later  on  I  was  baptized,  went  on  to  receive  the baptism of  the  Holy  Ghost  and  spoke  with 
tongues.    After  water baptism I was asked  which duties I would like  to perform in the  church. I  wanted to play  music  and to be a  treasurer. This was  my first 
encounter with the envelopes that had written on them: offerings, tithes, radio funds, missionary funds, love offerings and your name.   
           One service night, a sister came up to the altar. The pastor said she had seven devils. He told us, ―Get under the bl-oo-d‖, ―Plead the bl-oo-d‖, ―Sing the 
bl-oo-d‖. We had to stress on: ―The bl-oo-d, the bl-oo-d, the bl-oo-d of Jee-sus‖  
After many hours the pastor came to the pulpit and said, ―We cast out three devils and next service night we will cast out the other four devils‖.  
 On one occasion my nephew had a stiff-neck, I prayed for him and almost broke his neck. In my zeal I also prayed for a dying baby and told the father 
of the child not to take the child to the hospital because the child is healed. The child died and I became his enemy unto this day.  
           The same brother who had led me into Pentecostalism had just accepted  
the  messenger and he  led  me  to the  message.  After a  few  months  he  went back into the  world after a  preacher preached him down as a  sower of  discrepancy. 
Later on a sister came up with a revelation that five brothers were serpent-seeds. I was one of those brothers. We were a bit shaken and our only consolation was 
prayer. We had to face this spirit for a few services. This sister also influenced others not to shake our hands in spite of our efforts. One night after service as I 
was walking home with a sister called Patsy, I made another attempt to shake the sister‘s hand. But she refused, shook herself up and walked off in anger. At this 
point I remembered that I had encountered such a spirit in the Pentecostal church and I told her that she had an old Pentecostal Devil! At the next service, to my 
surprise, the sister shook my hand and the others came also to apologize.  
[px]PENTECOSTAL FANATICISM – MESSAGE MINISTER 
[px]           In the  year 1996, on the 22
nd
 of December I went to visit a church in Trinidad located at El Socorro. Together with me  was a brother, his little son and 
daughter. Our purpose was to meet the brethren in the message. Arrangements for our visit were made via telephone with one Deacon Desmond and confirmed 
by another Deacon Rodney. They were informed that a party of four were coming to visit. My pastor, Brother Dalton Bruce, was away from church from the 11
th
[px]- 28
th
 December 1996 and had no knowledge of our visit nor did he send us to visit the church. We were given an invitation to visit by another brother. During 
our visit there was a prophecy made by the pastor of the church - Sham Ali.  
           Before he prophesied, he started cackling like a hen, and crowing like a cock. This went on for about half an hour. He ―prophesied‖ saying, ―I see, I see, I 
see, I see‖.  ―I am seeing things‖. ―Do you want to hear what I see?‖ ―I see three brothers are here amongst us. They are not here to worship, they are spies sent to 
visit churches. They have been sent by one. I know him. He is their pastor. His name is Bruce, Bruce, Bruce, Bruce, Bruce. His name is Dalton Bruce, he is their 
pastor. He sent them, he who it is that sent them. He has held my people in bondage. He is being worshipped as God by my people. He never give the glory to 
God but had built himself a kingdom. His kingdom will come down. I will bring down his kingdom saith the Lord and set my people free. He has held many of 
my people in bondage. You brothers can be set free this morning. Thus saith the Lord, you can be set free. Accept your deliverance.‖ 
           During the meeting he claimed to have spoken a new bone into a sister‘s hand, whose name was Gita. The sister died and never received her new bone. 
 He also called a couple up to the altar and told the sister that she will have a baby in her old age like Sarah and Abraham. 
 He further went on to tell a brother that he will be healed of his kidney  
problem, and that the swollen veins in his hand will go down as a sign from the Lord. 
 He then prophesied again of a brother having doubts about his ministry. 
Pastor Sham said, ―If these things are true you will scream at the top of your voice‖. I noticed that after Pastor Sham had requested three times for the brother to 
scream, the brother then made several attempts to scream. 
           After the service I was questioned by Pastor Sham: ―Were my prophesies of God or of the devil?‖  
I replied, ―It is of the devil‖. I also made it clear to him that I did not want to get into any argument and that I never came to spy. 
 Later on I wrote Deacon Rodney a letter. These are some excerpts of what I wrote. 
           ―I have known Brother Bruce for the past thirteen years. I never saw or heard of anyone worshipping Brother Bruce and never heard him claim any such 
thing or try to lift up himself as anybody. If I ever met a man of God, he is one. One who is in love with Brother Branham‘s holiness message, love God‘s word 
and his people, stands for this message and is persecuted the most for such. He never had to repent for adultery or taking the sheep‘s wool or for fanaticism on 
the message. He does not desire wealth, fame or any kingdom here on earth. I know better; I am a true witness.‖ 
           ―I never confronted your pastor, Sham Ali. I do not want to be rebuked by Brother Dalton Bruce if any would give such untrue report. We appreciate the 
attitude of the sheep towards us in making us feel welcome but not the pastor‘s attitude which was most unwelcoming. I am on scriptural grounds in bringing this 
matter to your attention as a Deacon, seeing I have already declared myself to your pastor, Sham Ali.‖ 
           ―The prophecies were questionable to us since it cannot be justified by the Word or the message. I cannot understand how his first prophecy could be false 
and the other four true, if it is the Spirit of God speaking. We are closely monitoring these other prophecies and await their fulfilment. If they are of God, they 
will come to pass. I hope I am free to visit again, especially to confirm the fulfilment of these prophecies. Your brother, Pastor Kellman.‖     
[px]YOUR ADVERSARY 
R. L. LAMBERT - THE FIRST MARTYR  
28-01 1971 
[px]Many more are  wiser today concerning a  final outpouring of the Holy Spirit for rapture power, than when the prophet W.M. Branham first declared 
that  marvellous promise and concluded the same  with his highlight message called the token. This vision was passed on to a humble little  man R. L. Lambert, 
who kept it alive and sealed his testimony with his blood, contending for the token and many other truths of the message.  
 However,  ministers  who  proclaim  that  vision  of  the  token  are  not  aware  of  preparations  which  must  be  made  before  the  church  receives  it.  When 
E.O.D.H  presented  the  truth,  many,  because  of  selfish  motives,  desire  for  independency  in  trying  to  shun  the  Nicolaitan  system  and spirit, which  is  prevalent 
around the  message and perhaps previously dominated them.  Some began preaching the token, claiming that revelation first handed. However, they only have 
half of the truth  
To help those  precious brethren  who  mean  well, I  state  honestly and sincerely that our  system is  not based  upon Nicolaitanism, but it is based  upon 
scriptural  order.  We  allow  each  local  pastor  to  be  led  of  the  Spirit  and  not  make  him  accountable  to us:  financially,  doctrinally  or  otherwise.  We  deal  with 
thousands around the  world and do not have  the  time  for such Nicoliatanism. However, if there  arises a  question  which  we  can answer,  we  try to help in that 
respect, especially if questions are based upon our teachings. We shun fanaticism, cults and isms and do not hold ourselves accountable  for those  who identify 
themselves  with E.O.D.H  for the  wrong purpose, and  who  preach contrary to the  message  and truth  which  we  proclaim.  The  following quotations were  taken 
from a message of the first martyr, preached in 1971. We trust that this will be of edification to all as it had been to us at Bethel, GCC and other churches.  
[px]―Now, if  you ever held steady,  hold real steady.    Satan  has  moved  up  in  heavy  force  and  I  have  been  standing  my  post  of  duty  in  prayer  and 
consecration that God would move back the pressure and He has.  How many felt the pressure roll back here?  How many know it was great pressure moved up 
right after I closed this service out during the week?  How many felt it?  How many feel it move back, now?  I know that we‘ve got the victory over the enemy.   
And so I certainly have appreciated the  great Power of the  Holy Spirit that  has been in our midst and everything that  was done  was led by the Lord 
Jesus.  There were no mistakes, no mistakes.  Everything was right on time.  And it was wonderful that the Lord led us that way because it certainly helped us.  
How many, it helped each one of you?  To show you that it is a total impossibility to receive that Token unless you come God‘s provided way—no other way.  
[px]And the  desperation is  not desperation praying  for the  Token to come  but the desperation is being desperate  for  you to come  God‘s provided way to get the 
Token.  You could get desperate for the Token to come and it would never come to you unless you come God‘s provided way for that Token Promise to come.   
Now, we are going to be continually in a closer walk with the Lord Jesus that we might be ready at that chosen season that He will come.  And then if 
we are not ready when He comes, I believe it will be our own fault because He will give each and every one ample time to prepare himself for that great event. 
So  we  want  to  keep  our  Assembly  just  as  reverent,  just  as  reverent  as  we  possibly  can.    And  of  course  there  are  times  when  you have to  whisper.  
There are some times when an emergency arises with the children or something that you have to whisper, and we understand that.  But we should come under 
here with great expectation that we are in the Presence of Jehovah God and He is investigating our lives.   
I  believe  that,  in  these  few  days,  the  investigating  Angel,  (that  supernatural  Presence  that  you  felt)  passed  by  here  investigating  your  lives  and  He 
didn‘t find that you were able to be sealed.  If He had found it, He would have sealed you.  So then, you ought to be thankful because if He had Sealed a couple, 
then it could have been disastrous.   
[px]Demons are real 
[px]Let me tell you something, Brother and Sister, the devil is a real devil.  He is a real, live person and his demons are real, live.  They are real live; it‘s 
not just in your thinking.  There are real live demon forces.  There is a devil and he‘s Your Adversary and he‘s out to devour you.  And so what I‘m doing?  I‘m 
warning you in the Name of the Lord that if you have ever walked close to Christ, walk close to Him now because something has happened.   
Oh, how we need to pray that prayer, ―Lord....‖  Humble yourself, sanctify the Lord God in your heart daily.  Be prayed up every hour of the day.  Be 
prayed up every hour of the day.  Be led of the Holy Spirit every hour and every day.  Be led by the Holy Spirit.  Did you know that if you are not being led by 
the Holy Spirit every day, that if you are not prayed up and you are not consecrated to God and being led of the Holy Spirit every day that you are taking an 
organization life in you and it‘s organizing you?  We must be led of the Holy Spirit every day of our lives.  We must be led step by step, step by step, closer to 
the Promise of the hour.  How many believe that?   
We have an adversary, the devil, and he‘s a roaring lion going about seeking whom he may devour.  And I have got to warn this congregation, if I 
have ever in my life, for the past few days, if I ever seen the activity of demon power that is trying to get at this assembly, it has been in the last week!  And 
listen.  Whatever you do, you make sure that you live above sin because this Revelation, if you don‘t mean business to go on with God....   
I don‘t know how to say it but when you come up around where that Revelation is, you are moving up around something where all the demon activity 
and all the power of the devil is at.  Don‘t you realize that if God didn‘t have an office there and had not lifted that poor little brother up there to stand in that 
place, he would lose his mind, that no man could stand against the demon power that is around that Revelation, trying to destroy it?  Then don‘t you know that 
if you come and sit under that ministry that you‘re right there, that you‘re a target of every demon?   
[px]BREAKING DOWN THE WORD WITHOUT AN OFFICE - DANGER 
[px]But  when  you  see  men  coming  in—especially  preachers!    Watch  those  preachers!    Watch  any  man  that  wants  to  be  a  preacher—there‘s where the 
devil is laying.  Watch it!  Let me tell you something, Children.  How many are going to do what Brother Bob tells you?  Why would you men here  want to 
gather yourself together in houses and talk over a Revelation that God has not called you to handle?  Knowing that if you add one word to this Revelation that 
[px]God brought and if you take one word away from the Revelation, don‘t you realize that you could have already taken your name out  of  the  Book  of  Life?  
Supposing you think you got the Revelation down pat and you begin to try to teach your brothers in their homes when you‘re eating dinner with them or when 
you are out in the car, and you begin to try to bring out the Revelation of this and the Revelation of that.  Just supposing that you make a mistake?  Supposing 
that you add one word to it—He‘ll take your name out of the Book!   
Have not I warned you continually, year after year and year after year that ―I‘m the preacher!  I‘m the preacher; I‘m the preacher!  You‘re not the 
preacher!  You are not the preacher; you‘re only supposed to believe!‖  And let me tell you something: when you men go to one another‘s houses and you sit 
there  and  you start breaking down this Revelation to one  another, supposing that  you break it down  wrong?  Do you  have  an office down in there?  Do you 
have an office from God Almighty that is able to catch that Revelation and teach one another?  Then the Bible said, ―Be not many teachers [masters] among 
your congregation, knowing that ye shall receive the greater condemnation.‖  (James 3:1)  Come on now!  When you gather together for fellowship and some 
of you raise up and begin to start to explain the Revelation, what you‘re doing, you are making yourself a preacher whether you  believe  it  or  not!    (And 
remember, if you add one word to the Revelation or take one word away from it, He‘ll take your name out of the Book of Life.)   
[px]CHRIST IS THE VOICE OF GOD 
[px]Now, here, let me just explain it here this way.  How many love Brother Bob?  [Amen!]  I would rather ten of the biggest men in this congregation 
come over to my house and with their bare fists, each take their turn and beat me to a pulp until I had no eyes, no mouth, no nose, break every rib I got, break 
both my arms and both my legs.  I would rather you do it than to verbally be voicing by your mouth, ―I think Brother Bob‘s this.  I think Brother Bob‘s that.  I 
believe he‘s the Voice.‖   
I am not the Voice of God!  The Lord Jesus Christ is the Voice of God!  I am a sinner saved by grace!  A wretched, filthy, dirty, nasty sinner that was 
cleansed by the Blood of God! 
[px]OVEREMOTIONALISM – INSANITY SPIRITS 
[px]Let  me  tell  you  something.    What  we  need  to  do  is  to  harness  up  ourselves.    Watch  that over-emotionalism.    Balance  yourself  with  that  over-
emotionalism.  If you get out of cater with emotionalism, the devil will take a hold of you real quick.  Be emotional—sure!  Be emotional; love the Lord; praise 
Him.  But watch out when you get real emotional and get loose with your tongue, and then the devil will just hit you (See?) he‘ll hit you bad.   
Precious Brothers, don‘t preach to one another.  Don‘t preach to one another.  When you get together, say, ―Isn‘t the Lord Jesus wonderful?  Oh, I love 
Him with all my heart!  I prayed; I sought the Lord this morning.  I found His Presence.  Oh, I love Him; I just love His Word!  I can hardly wait to get back to 
service.  God bless you, Brother, how are you doing?  I‘m praying for you!  Oh Lord, encourage you and bless you!‖   
But now, when you start talking about those deep things—about that Voice of God and about all of those deep things that you have been hearing—oh, 
don‘t do that, Honey!  Don‘t try to handle that.  Don‘t try to explain that.  You are not able.  I tell you right now, you are not able to do it!  Let  me tell you 
something, if it wasn‘t a super, supernatural act from Almighty God, there is no way in the world that I could run that straight.  It‘s too, great!   
[px]Now Children, insanity spirits are loosed!  Insanity spirits.  Let me tell you something, you don‘t realize it, the devil will take a hold of you real quick 
now if you don‘t walk real careful; throw your mind in a confusion.  You reach up there and you try to get that Revelation and you‘ll try; and then the next 
thing you know, your mind will start giving way!   
[px]BRIDLE YOUR TOUNGE 
[px]How  many  here  (I  want to see your hands.) you want to bridle your tongue?  See, everybody.  I used to have a loose tongue.  I‘d try to tell a few 
secrets of the Lord.  God gave me visitation from the Lord and I saw Brother Branham.  He walked right up to me, just as stern as could be, and took that finger 
right there, and here he came with that finger, walking right toward me; come right to me!  He pressed it right down on me.  I tell you, he got through to me!  I 
said, ―God, have mercy, bridle my tongue!  God, bridle my tongue.‖   
[px]HEAVENLY MINDED – NO EARTHLY VALUE 
[px]Don‘t try to be so heavenly minded, you are of no earthly value.  Do like the Lord said the other day, ―Get a job, work.  If you don‘t need the money, 
go work that you might give to others,‖ the Bible said.  (Amen?)  Work that you might give to others.  Brother Branham said, ―Plant your corn.  Plant your 
potatoes.‖   
And don‘t try to be a superhuman.  God will make you spiritual as you are able to receive it.  What happened?  Look at all those guys out here that 
went off in rooms and closed the door and stayed in there, fasted and prayed.  Every one of them went cuckoo.  (The devil tried to take  me down that road.)  
No, just be  yourself; just be  yourself.  Be  sweet and kind,  and be  the kind of person  that people  like to be  around.  Be  a  good listener;  smile and be  a  good 
listener.  And people will say, ―I just love to be around that person; there‘s just something about them!‖  Let the other person do the talking.  And then, if you 
want to fast and pray and seek the Lord—wonderful!  You ought to.  Fast two or three days; wait upon the Lord hours; wait upon Him lots.  But, you see, when 
you try and get to pulling and trying to shove God into something you can‘t do that!  (See?)  Just day by day, grow in grace and become more like Him day by 
day.  Be real steady.  Do you understand what Brother Bob is saying?   
I like that saying, ―Don‘t try to be so heavenly minded that you are of no earthly value.‖  You see, you want to be of earthly value.  The Bible said, 
―Lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven.‖  (Matthew 6:20)  Now, how can you lay up any treasures in heaven if all of us go over and find out a big patch of 
woods and go over and hide in the woods; none of us work?  Suppose that everybody in the congregation say, ―Well, just working, and we might as well just 
quit!‖  Well, what is going to happen?  Stop the program of God!  You say, ―Well, God will create the food!‖  No, He won‘t!  He‘ll let you starve!  ―Oh, Praise 
the Lord!  We got faith.  We‘ll go over there and God will create a loaf of bread!‖  No, you‘ll go hungry and you‘ll starve!  (I‘m telling you the truth!) 
I know a sister, a good beloved sister of mine, Brother Branham said, ―Sister, you ought to go and have that tumor cut out.‖  She said, ―I‘d rather 
commit adultery on my husband before I‘d go to a doctor and let him cut that out!‖  Well, she almost died!  She should have gone and had it cut out.  Now what 
was she trying to do?  She was trying to be so heavenly minded that she was of no earthly value.  God wasn‘t pleased with that.  Now it was just the mercies of 
God that He didn‘t let her die.  What we got to do is....   
Like we were out in the woods with Brother Branham...I was out in the woods with Brother Branham, we all had beards and bloody clothes  and 
everything, but when we got to town, Brother Branham said, ―Preachers, shave!‖  Why?  Because, Don‘t be conspicuous!    A  Christian  should  never  be 
conspicuous. 
[px]Did you ever see somebody that would try to act really spiritual in the congregation to get everybody‘s attention?  That is hypocrisy.  You know, some 
people like to pray on the streets but Jesus said, ―They don‘t want to pray in their prayer closet because they only want to pray to be seen of man.‖  See, that 
man is trying to be spiritually minded but he‘s of no earthly value.  But now, why couldn‘t we just be....  
I think, to me, Brother Branham was a prime example for us to follow.  I never did see Brother Branham, as many times as I ever shook hands with 
him, when I went up and shook hands with him, I never did hear him say, ―Praise the Lord, Hallelujah!‖  Not one time did he ever do it, not one time!  Every 
time I ever met him he said, ―Why Bob, how are you?  You‘re looking to me like you‘re gaining weight, Boy.  It‘s good to see you!‖   
... Now, we have formed a religious habit of praising the Lord for things that we shouldn‘t praise Him for.  (See?)  When we meet somebody, we 
automatically say, ―Praise the Lord, Hallelujah!‖  Well, now but you‘re not really saying that sincerely.  You are saying that out of habit.  It‘s a habit.  I know a 
certain minister who said, ―Why, I called a brother on the phone and he didn‘t even say,  ̳Praise the Lord!‘  Such a sour spirit!‖   
[px]DANGER OF PREACHING 
[px]And I know if the devil can get somebody that thinks he is a  
preacher, he can do great damage with him.  There is a great danger to think that you are called when you are not because the devil....  You‘ve got to be really 
sure that you are called and you‘ve got to watch that because the devil will really lay it on us.  So, leave the preaching to the preacher.   
Now watch this here.  Now let me just show you something.  All right.  Let‘s suppose that a brother has a true Revelation; he has  the  real  true 
Revelation of what I‘m trying to get to you; and he comes over to your house and he begins to try to explain that to you.  Let‘s say that he tries to explain it to 
you and then you explain it back to him and he says, ―I believe you‘ve got it now!‖  Do you know what you have?  You‘ve got a third-hand religion.  You‘ve 
done passed it down two ways and now you‘ve got a third-hand religion.  How many say, ―Amen?‖   
But now, look here.  ―Faith cometh by hearing and hearing the Word of God‖ from the man that God called to hear it.  Listen now.  The Word of God is 
of no private interpretation.  No one has any right—no right whatsoever—to try to interpret the Revelation of this hour.  God is His own interpreter and it has 
to be God doing the interpreting.  And then if it is God doing the interpreting, then it‘s perfect!  But then if it is handed down through the congregation and they 
begin  to  hand  it  to  one  another  (then  it  has  changed  hands  two  or  three  times)  and  then  what  do  you  have?    Then  you  warp  that person‘s thinking.  When, if 
everyone will sit in the congregation and keep hearing that ministry, keep hearing that ministry coming forth and then, when the Holy Ghost overshadows them, 
it drops down in their heart—a Revelation—they‘ll have it just like the preacher has got it—by a Revelation from God.  Then you‘re standing solid but then if 
you try to hand it back and forth. 
[px]KNOWING YOUR ENEMY 
R. L. LAMBERT - THE FIRST MARTYR  
19-05-71 
[px]REVELATION ON THE DEVIL’S STRATEGY 
[px]We have revelation on the Godhead but, we need revelation on the devil.  You can know who Jesus is but you need to know all about the devil.   
[px]Back in so-called Pentecost they didn‘t talk about the devil. I don‘t know how come they get that way but they never talk about the devil!  They say, 
―Don‘t mention the devil in here!‖  Well, because that they didn‘t mention the devil, the devil took the churches over and the devil baptized them with his spirit 
and the devil spoke in tongues and done all kind of things because the ministry didn‘t want to talk about the devil.  Well, I talk a lot about the devil!   
And I believe this is an hour when the Bride of Christ for the first time, for the first time the elected Bride of Christ, since Jesus Christ died at Calvary, 
is  to  get  a complete  victory over the devil.  And you can‘t get a complete victory  over  the  devil  unless  you  have  a revelation of  the  devil.    You  must  have 
revelation on the devil and how the devil works and how he moves.  We know how the apostle Paul said, ―We are not ignorant of his devices.‖  [II Corinthians 
2:11]  And that word, ―devices,‖ means we are not ignorant of Satan‘s strategy.   
I find that there is a great danger in that Satan can take somebody that is just so sincere just like a baby, just as sincere, as sincere can be, and be so in 
love with the Lord Jesus—and then turn right around and deceive that person and just beat them to death.  It‘s because that sheep must have a shepherd to watch 
over them and lead them.   
[px]OUTPOURING BY GRACE 
[px]Now,  how are  we going to  get  this revival that  we have  been preaching about all these  years?  How are  we  going to  get  an outpouring of the Holy 
Spirit?   
Number one: it is predestinated; it‘s foreordained and predestinated of God.  God, in sovereign Grace, has let us see into His  plan  for  this  hour—by 
sovereign  Grace.    That‘s  the  only  difference.    There‘s  no  other  way  you  could  even  see  into  God‘s  plan  in  this  hour  other  than  being  foreordained  and 
predestinated to see it.   
I believe that what we have to do is be so wise and so Scripturally trained that we‘ll know the tactics of the devil.   
Now let me just say it like this.  It is a total impossibility for any assembly to get an Outpouring of the Holy Ghost unless God has elected that assembly 
to get it.  In the first place, the Outpouring has got to be in the Word of God.  Is that right?  Now look what they had out at Azusa Street—that wasn‘t Pentecost.  
That wasn‘t Pentecost at all!  But here we have a Promise to return to the original Power that fell on the hundred and twenty on the Day of Pentecost.  We got 
that Promise so we‘re coming to God, not because we just want that in our heart, but because He promised it in His Word.   
That‘s the way that you stand in faith in Christ, as you stand on the Word of God and confess what the Word says.  It‘s not so much how you feel, or whether 
you‘re up today or down tomorrow.  This revival, this Outpouring of the Holy Ghost, this Bride of Christ that is to come forth, a super Church, it isn‘t rested on 
whether or not you and I are up today or down tomorrow, or whether you feel like it‘s coming today or tomorrow.  It‘s God‘s Promise!  God‘s sovereign Grace 
promised that there would be a supernatural Bride Church here and there is nothing can stop it! 
[px]REVELATION OF THE WORD TO FIGHT SATAN 
[px]I never had enough wisdom and revelation on the Scriptures to know how to fight the devil.  See, you can‘t just fight the devil with tears; you can‘t just 
fight the devil down on your knees crying and praying to the Lord; you can‘t fight the devil like that!  The only thing that will back up the devil is the revealed 
Word of God.  (See?)  You say, ―The Power,‖ that‘s right!  But Power without the revealed Word of God won‘t do it.  It has to be the revealed Word of God.  
Just the revealed Word of God will put him to flight.  And I didn‘t have enough of the Word of God to fight the devil, he just tormented me all the time that I was 
going to lose my ministry—oh, it was just terrible! (Ch. Ages p-13-16). 
[px]SINCERE - RIGHT LEADERSHIP 
[px]The  sovereign  Grace  of  God  has  predestinated a  Church;  He  has  predestinated  a  Bride;  He  has  predestinated  believers  who  are  going  to  receive  the 
Token of God; and that is what we have to rest in.  It doesn‘t make any difference whether it tarries six months or a year.  It  will be  here  anyway.  The  thing 
about us, let us make sure that we believe it and we are here to receive It; no matter when it is, God is going to do it.   
But  what  is  it  going  to  take?    I  think  the  only  thing  that  will  stand  against  the  tactics  of  the  devil  in  this  hour  and  his  strategy,  is  having  the right 
leadership.  I believe it all hinges on the right leadership.   
It is because and what I find out is that no matter how spiritual and how anointed—the best that you have in the laity—they are no match for the devil!  I 
have watched people go (and let them go) and see how they go this way; and I have to go to them and straighten them out this way.  I see them go this way.  I let 
them go a month or so and come back here and they will just be, (if we didn‘t put a hand to it and straighten it out) they would be just in disaster —and be just as 
sincere, as sincere as can be and love the Lord Jesus—I mean right down love Him and be living the life!  See?  
You can‘t try to make yourself something you are not.  You can‘t make yourself spiritual.  You can‘t study the Word of God and figure it out, see.   
But  how  are  you  going  to  know  the tactics of the enemy?  Just have the right leadership and just be what you are.  Be honest, you see.  Don‘t try to put on 
something.  (See?)  Don‘t try to make people think you‘re spiritual; don‘t try to act spiritual; just be a normal human being; just love the Lord and read your 
Bible and pray. 
[px]PRAYER & FAST - WRONG MOTIVE 
[px]I had one man say to me, ―You mean to tell me I went back there on that hill, Brother Lambert, and I sought the Lord and now I got deceived?‖  ―Yes 
sir, sure did!  You got deceived.‖  See where does it all....  It‘s in the sovereign Grace of God, the sovereign Grace of God.  God seeks after you; God seeks after 
you, then you pray and seek the Lord, but if your heart isn‘t right when you are praying and seeking God....   
What are people seeking God for?  I have seen many men seeking God and praying and fasting but their motive and their objective to what they were 
praying and fasting for wasn‘t right with the Word of God or the Spirit of Christ.  (See?)  What are these men praying and fasting for?  Is it to make themselves 
have great Power with God?  I believe you could fast until you‘re just skin over your bones and you would have no Power with God.  No sir.  It doesn‘t come 
that way.  It comes by the sovereign Grace of the Lord Jesus.  Now you could....   
That‘s why that I say, in this hour, that when many men....  I have seen several say, ―Brother Bob, I just want to go off in the woods and I don‘t want to 
work and I don‘t want to be out in the world, and I just want to get down and just pray and fast, and pray and fast.‖  I wouldn‘t advise that at all.  In fact, I surely 
say, as I said before, I don‘t believe, in this hour, that a person ought to fast over two, three or four days.  How many say, ―Amen‖ to that?  You can‘t....  Why 
there is people overseas and in caves, up in those mountains, over there in Palestine, monks that fast and pray and spend their whole lives there in prayer.  What 
good does it ever do?  They never come to the knowledge of the Truth.   
But  no  matter  how  sincere  you  are,  the  enemy  is  too  much  of  a  match  for  any  preacher  that  doesn‘t  have  an  office  inside  of  him.    If  he  isn‘t 
predestinated and ordained of God, the devil is too much for that preacher and he is too much for the laity.  The devil is too much of a match for any person in the 
laity.  I don‘t care how spiritual they may think they are or you may think they are; they are no match for the devil. 
[px]THE DEVIL WORKS IN EXTREME LONG FASTS 
[px]You  can  make  some  mistakes  like  that  and  you  get  so  scared,  then  you  start  fasting  and  fasting,  praying  and  praying  and  praying  and  praying  and 
praying, and think you get a little revelation, and then what is he doing?  Then the next thing you know, you are going along (and God will bless you like that a 
little bit) and next thing you know, then you will begin to get impressions and imagine the Lord is telling you something; the Lord is saying this and the Lord is 
saying that.  Then, he has got you on that side now.  (See?  How many understand what I am saying?)   
The devil is all the time right there to get you sidetracked, to get you  
going down this way, gets you to go down this extreme, that extreme.  The devil works in extremes.  He will get you to work in extremes.  He will get you to 
where you won‘t read your Bible at all; won‘t pray.  Or then you get so lopsided....  I have seen people get so lopsided the other way.   
I heard one man (a family man) say ―I am going to get a forty day leave of absence from work and I am going to go fast and pray until I hear from God.‖  
Everybody and the people that aren‘t spiritual say, ―Isn‘t that wonderful?  Isn‘t that wonderful?‖  I don‘t think it is wonderful at all!  The poor brother ought to go 
on to working and take care of his family and everything.   
Then what does he do?  Go over there and then what happens?  Everybody knows he is over there trying to fast forty days.  He isn‘t going to get one 
thing out of it: he is going to miss all those pay days for forty days; he is going to lose a lot of weight; he is going to go through all kinds of tormenting things; he 
will look awfully hollowed-eyed and peaked and he may die. 
―If I were you, I would throw that old nasty book away that you have been reading, ―Atomic Power with God Through Fasting‖ and throw it in the trash 
can because that is the biggest tool of the devil that I know of.‖ 
Come to find out that he was actually reading that book!   
He could make—you can just get so desperate to see God move, then you could go into fasting and fasting and fasting and fasting and fasting, then all at 
once you just watch and then in your mind, your mind, your mind will begin to get weak.  And then you‘ll begin to imagine that the Lord is speaking to you and 
imagining that you‘re seeing things in the Spirit and you‘re not.  That‘s right!  The devil tried to take me down that road many years ago.  The Lord Jesus let the 
prophet of God speak to me.  He said, ―Robert, stay away from those long fasts.  They‘ll put you in an insane asylum!‖  I said, ―Yes sir!‖  And that ended it right 
there; that ended it right there. 
Boy, I believe God is looking for a people that are so established upon the Word of God, they look it over; they look at it real good; they‘re established 
upon the Word of God.  They are sure and steady; they want to know what they are excited about.  How many say, ―Amen‖ to that?  The only thing that‘s going 
to stand is a real Scripturally trained people to the line because you don‘t know what kind of test the enemy has got waiting down the road on you here.   
[px]SCRIPTURALLY TRAINED CHURCH 
[px]The only hope that we‘ve got to know the tactics of the enemy is that God has released Seven Seals of mystery that we might have a Divine revelation 
upon the antichrist.  As long as we keep that Promise before us and realize that that Promise is coming by the sovereign Grace of God. 
So as we go on in this journey, Children, we are going to have to be Scripturally trained to the line.  And if you have it up here, if you only have it up 
here in the head, surely, as surely as I stand here, there is going to be something in the future is going to flip you and turn you the other way.  You have to!  It has 
to come that place to you because if it‘s not a revelation down in your heart (you just don‘t have it there) there has to be some test there for you that will break 
you down.  So it‘s going to be the sovereign Grace of God by Divine revelation.  We don‘t know how it  will  be, when is  He  going  to  do  it.    That,  Children, 
believe me, I don‘t know when He is going to do it; I don‘t now how He is going to do it.   
[px]OUTPOURING LIKE DAY OF PENTECOST 
[px]It wasn‘t just coming up to the altar and saying, ―Jesus, Jesus, Praise  
the Lord.  Praise the Lord.‖  No sir!  It‘s being led and being prepared to receive the Baptism of the Holy Spirit.  Then Jesus was led to the Jordan and received it; 
went into the wilderness for His great testing; He came out with the Power of God upon Him and then, great signs and wonders and miracles took place.  But He 
knew the tactics of the enemy, the devil.  As long as we wait on the Lord, wait on the Lord then we are on safe ground.  As long as we don‘t try to do it but as 
long as we wait for Him to do it.  After all, Children, we‘ve seen enough imitation and enough of so-called this and that, that we ought to wait for something real.   
Like I said, I wouldn‘t be satisfied if the Holy Ghost fell and everybody spoke with tongues—that wouldn‘t satisfy me.  I want to see happen just exactly 
what happened on the Day of Pentecost and if God brought a Sound then, He will have to bring a Sound again.  If the Pillar of Fire came, it will have to come 
again; and if the people were filled the Holy Ghost like they were there, it has to do it again; and it has to write another Book of Acts out behind it. There has to 
be an exact Church, an exact Bride, just exactly like that one or it isn‘t the Bride.   
[px]MIDDLE OF THE ROAD - WORSHIP 
[px]You go into a service, I believe, where a real spiritual assembly is, people worship the Lord the way they want to.  If you don‘t want to raise your hands 
and praise God, don‘t raise them; if you don‘t want to, don‘t raise them.  If you want to sit there and cry and whisper and make love to the Lord like that, that‘s 
all right.  But, you see, just because maybe this brother over here does this certain way, don‘t you do it that way, if you don‘t want to.  (See?)  You worship the 
Lord the way you want to, then you have freedom of the Spirit and then you won‘t be too noisy and you won‘t be too....  Then you go in some assemblies where 
there are some in there that want to praise the Lord, (then you go in there) but certain things are said, then they are all too scared to worship the Lord on account 
of ―church order.‖  To me now, that congregation is bound—no liberty of the Holy Spirit—but (See?): tactics of the devil.  What is it?  To get your congregation 
cold.   
And then, if you go the other hand, until you get it in a bunch of fanaticism—just no quality of the Holy Spirit—just noise....  But, oh Lord, for a people 
to go down the middle of the road today.  If we could....  God, the sovereign Grace of God, take us down the middle of the road: that we‘ll love the Lord; we‘ll 
read our Bible—not read our Bible and come up with some kind of a personal revelation—but just love the Lord and read the Bible.  You will get revelation if 
you love the Lord.  Just read the Bible; just pray; give up some meals for the Lord, fast, pray; read your Bible; come to service and wait, wait.  The commission is 
wait there for the Holy Spirit to come.  Oh, I don‘t know how to tell it!  But I wish that I could just impart to people how that I think that you can just walk down 
the middle of the road.  (See?)  You worry about people. 
[px]Pentecostalism – 100 years 
CONCLUSION 
[px] In conclusion of this subject: ―Pentecostalism – One Hundred Years‖, our contentions remain the same. Jude 1:3 <... contend for the faith which was 
once delivered unto the saints.>  
We contend for the true article of Pentecost, Joel 2:23, the latter rain, apostolic doctrine, apostolic standards and God‘s promises. 
 Therefore, we conclude, in no uncertain terms, that 1906 was not a return of Pentecost, but rather the birth of Pentecostalism, which emerged out of a 
genuine outpouring of the Holy Spirit, with sincere people, through gifts of the Spirit, wrongly termed, ―The return of Pentecost.‖ 
[px] If  our  doctrine  is  wrong,  we  challenge  the  religious  world  and  all  of  Pentecostalism  to  identify  modern  Pentecostalism  with  Christ,  His  apostles,  the 
early church and the written Word of God. The Bible said, ―Ye shall know them by their fruits.‖ (Matthew 7:16-20). 
 Pentecostalism has born corrupt fruits and fulfilled many Bible prophecies, that even a blind man who is even  halfway sincere can clearly understand 
that Pentecostalism, which started off as a move of God, has now become a satanic body, fully anointed of Satan to form the World Council of Churches, and in 
collaboration with the U.S.A., leads the whole world to the mark of the Beast, which comes from Romanism through a one world Government. (Ref. Revelation 
13: 13-18). Therefore, we call every soul to repentance and to come out of that system. 
Revelation 18: 4 <And I heard another voice from heaven, saying, Come out of her, my people, that ye be not partakers of her sins, and that ye receive 
not of her plagues. > 
 We call the followers of Malachi 4: 5-6, who claim that baptism as a return of Pentecost and depend upon it to take them in the rapture, to repentance. 
Come let us contend for the true article of Pentecost.  
 Revelation 22:17 <And the Spirit and the bride say, Come. And let him that heareth say, Come. And let him that is athirst come. And whosoever will, let 
him take the water of life freely.> Amen! 
[px]

notes.details: The root of modern evangelism and televangelists. It is the root of all religions: Protestantism and Catholicism. It has become the root of Sodom and Gomorrah. It will be the root of a one world church and a one world government and most assuredly the root of the mark of the beast-666, Revelation 13:13-18. This will finally bring the destruction of Rome and the rest of the world.

notes.title: EODH_Book16.pdf
notes.details:
INTRODUCTION 
 
 Bethel  the  House  of  God  and  its  publishing  arm  E.O.D.H.  are  pleased  to  present  to all  people,  and 
especially saints  of  the message world E.O.D.H. Book 16 entitled: ―Pentecostalism Under the Message Versus the 
Joshua Generation.‖ 
  
Pentecostalism  celebrated  its  100
th
 year  of  existence.  Its  organized  religion  dates  back  to  1906.  In  2006 
Exposition of Damnable Heresies – E.O.D.H. Book fifteen was written as our contribution to that international event 
and memorial of millions in religious circles. 
  
Our work went around the world by  our Bethel websites, audio and video coverage and also hard bound 
copies.  It  was  unchallengeable  by  the  Pentecostal  system  and  the message  world.  Many  were  blessed,  and  edified, 
and are now established in the truth concerning the subject of the baptism of the Holy Ghost. 
  
It was undeniably proven by the written Word, Pentecostal history and the message of W.M. Branham the 
prophet  messenger  of  Malachi  4:  5-6 and  Revelation  10:  7, that the  1906  outpouring  of  the  Holy  Ghost  was  not  a 
return  of  Pentecost.  It  was not  the  original article  of  Acts  2:  4 hence  it  did not  produce  the miracles  written  in  the 
book of Acts and demonstrated by the early apostolic church. 
  
However it proved itself to be an anointing upon the flesh, and the genuine gifts of the Holy Ghost. As a 
result it ended in fanaticism, Sodom and Gomorrah and the biggest religious disgrace that the world has ever seen in 
the history of time. 
  
E.O.D.H.  Book  Sixteen  is  based  upon  the  fact  that the  message  world has  borrowed  the  article  of  1906, 
has far less manifestations of power, signs and wonders which accompanied early Pentecostalism. They hope to be 
translated for the rapture by the very article that Pentecostalism has built their hopes. Instead of being perfected they 
are  drifting  faster  than  Pentecostalism  into  Sodom  and  Gomorrah  and  its  vices.  Heretics  and  false  anointed  ones 
dominate message  assemblies.  Immorality  prevails  in  every  aspect.  Total  disobedience  to  the  holiness  message  of 
the Bible and the message exist. Above all is the denial of another outpouring of the Holy Spirit promised to the end 
time Bride for quickening power, translation power for the rapture. 
 
I 
In this  book,  message  believers  are  examined  by  the  scriptures  and  the  message  of  Malachi 4:  5-6, 
especially by  the  journey  of  Israel  under  Moses  to  the  Promise  Land.  It  is  evident  by  the  fruits  that  message 
believers have produced that they have made the same fatal mistake that Israel made: denial of the Promised Land, 
the final outpouring of the Holy Ghost for rapture power.  
 
RETURN OF PENTECOST – FINAL QUICKENING UNTO THE RAPTURE 
 
Quote W.M.B.:  377-2 This age started just after the turn of the twentieth century. As it was to be the age 
in which the true church would return to being the bride she was at Pentecost, we know that there must of necessity 
be  a  return  of  dynamic  power.  The  believers  sensed  this  in  their  spirits  and  began  crying  to  God  for  a  new 
outpouring such as was in the first century. 
What seemed to be the answer came as many began to speak in tongues and manifest gifts of the Spirit. It 
was  then  believed  that  this  was  indeed  the  long  awaited  RESTORATION.  It  was  not,  for  the  latter  rain  can come 
only after the former rain which is the spring or TEACHING rain. The latter rain, then, is the HARVEST rain. How 
could this be the real thing when the Teaching Rain had not come? The Prophet-Messenger who  was to be sent to 
TEACH the people and turn the hearts of the children back to the Pentecostal fathers had not yet come. Thus what 
was thought to be the restoration and the final quickening unto the rapture had not come. (A Resume Of The Ages - 
Church Age Book Cpt. 10).  
 

 II Thessalonians 1:7-10 < And to you who are troubled rest with us, when the Lord Jesus shall be revealed 
from heaven with his mighty angels,  
In flaming fire taking vengeance on them that know not God, and that obey not the gospel of our Lord Jesus 
Christ:  
Who shall be punished with everlasting destruction from the presence of the Lord, and from the glory of his 
power;  
When he shall come to be glorified in his saints, and to be admired in all them that believe (because our 
testimony among you was believed ) in that day.> 
 
 This work  has  defied  the  pessimism that  exist  around  the  message,  saying  that  all  was  in  Brother 
Branham, all is over and there is no more ministry of signs and wonders to the Bride. 
 
 It has exalted God‘s promised outpouring and the declaration of the prophet W.M. Branham that we  will 
receive the Token or perish. Israel under Moses perished at Kadesh Barnea because of their unbelief (Hebrews 4). 
 
Nevertheless where sins and unbelief abounded grace did much more abound. As in the midst of Israel‘s 
unbelief God raised up a Joshua generation,  
II 
He has done likewise under the message. The elect out of the mixed multitude that follow the message will

REBUKES MAKE MANIFEST SPIRITS 
 
He  was  typing  the  natural  with  the  spiritual.  If  there  is  a  dark  place  here,  a  dark  room  and  you  want  to 
know what‘s in the room, the only way that you will know what is in the room is to shine the light. Now, Brother 
Paul was typing out that. He said, ―Whatsoever doth make manifest is light.‖ In other words, there is only one way 
to see and understand what is the object in that dark room is to shine the light on it. You could say, ―I feel it,‖ but 
then you have doubts. You could walk into that room and feel it and you say, ―It feels like a dollar bill or it feels like 
a ten dollar bill, it feels like a hundred dollar bill.‖ But then, you are in doubt. Yes. You could say that it feels like a 
piano, but then if you want to be certain about it, shine the light.  
So now, Paul was taking that little topic there and typing it to the natural light and the objects that you see. 
If you lose something in the yard, and then you search, and search and search and cannot find it, you may say, ―In 
the morning I will find it when the sun is risen.‖ Even because the light is going to make it manifest. Yes. Now, you 
got  to  understand  the thoughts  of  the  writer, the  scribe,  because  it  is  so  brief  with  so  much revelation  in  there.  So 
now,  he is  taking  that  same natural light and typing  it to  the  spiritual. He said, ―The only way that you will know 
what is in  a  man is to let the gospel light shine upon him and reprove him.‖ Isn‘t that the correct understanding?

BASIS OF PENTECOSTALISM UNDER THE MESSAGE 
 
We spoke about Pentecostalism from 1906 to 2006, I am using this opportunity of the latest development 
in  that  church,  which  God  allowed,  to  lay  emphasis,  that  you  could  be  under  this  message  but  you  are still  a 
Pentecostal: with the same characteristics, and the same traits and one day you will manifest it. You could be under 
this message and depend upon that anointing of 1906. You could be under this message, friends, and have all those 
traits  there  with  your  soul  untouched.  Now,  Judas  heard  all  that  truth,  seen  all  the  miracles,  was  anointed,  he 
preached  the  gospel,  I  guess  he  worked  signs  and  wonders  but  beloved,  his  soul  was  not  touched,  and  that  is  the 
basis of Pentecostalism. Now, if you could find the same basis under the message, then friends, it‘s Pentecostalism 
under  the  message.  I  believe  that  is  abc‘s,  that  if  you  could  find  the  same  traits  under  the  message,  it  is 
Pentecostalism. 
Back  in  so-called  Pentecost,  friends,  men  preached  the  gospel,  they  worked  signs,  they  worked  wonders, 
they  raised  the  dead,  I  tell  you,  mass  healings,  and  then  they  found  them  in  sodomy.  The  very  father  of  the  thing 
called Parham. Then, they found these people as adulterers and fornicators. Women preached contrary to the Word 
of God: they were not called to do so but yet they were mightily used in signs, and wonders and miracles. And that 
spells out Pentecostalism. Those people  who were deceived by  Pentecostalism they were greater than anybody that 
is now sitting under the message, because they had something that the people under the message do not have today, 
except for the message of a true prophet called William Branham.  
Those   people   worked   signs   and wonders,   spoke   in   tongues   and   manifested   gifts.   When   I   say 
Pentecostalism: Pentecostalism means to be used of God in signs and wonders, anointing, singing and preaching but 
the soul is  yet dark as midnight. And there are many today  around the world, which are under this message whose 
soul is not yet touched. They make manifest that their souls are  yet dark as midnight, even because  when the truth 
comes to them about another outpouring of the Holy Spirit they resisted, fought and condemned it. When correction 
goes out about their perverted lives, adultery, fornication, sports, high heel shoes, the wrong type of dresses for the 
women  they  retaliate  and preachers  say  that  they  like  to  see  the  women  the  way  that they  dress  in  their mermaid 
dresses. Now, for you to make that statement you got to have a certain spirit in you. I guess the serpent liked how 

Eve dressed because he had intentions. And these preachers love the way that the women dress because they have 
eyes of adultery.  
So that old, carnal nature was in these men of so-called Pentecost, and then if we could see the same things 
under the message it is the same problem, that men received what they called the baptism of the Holy Spirit and the 
prophet of God said, 
  
Quote W.M.B. 162 You can have the baptism of the Holy Ghost every hour in your life and still be lost and 
go to hell. (Leadership 65-1207). 
 
Yes.  Anointed  of  the  Spirit,  gifted  men; we  are  not  doubting  the  gifts  of  so-called  Pentecost;  we  are  not 
doubting  the  anointing  of  so-called  Pentecost.  No  sir!  We  are  saying  that  their  souls  were  not  touched  because  if 
their  souls  were  touched  they  could  not  have  manifested  the  fruits  that  they  manifested.  To  prove  that  fact,  when 
God sent a man called William Branham to correct them and reprove them they rebelled. 
Revelation 3: 19 <As many as I love, I rebuke and chasten: be zealous therefore, and repent.> 
When  the  light  came  by  William  Branham,  Malachi  4:  5&6  and  he  reproved  the  church,  then  what 
happened? They rejected the messenger even because their souls were not touched.  
And when a man rejects correction and the truth of God‘s Word his souls is not touched. As a young man 
you could be seated here but then your heart is in the world, but you enjoy the singing and you like to hear the Word 
preached. I‘m  telling  you.  And  then,  you  could  feel  the  anointing  on  your  body  and  you  could  enjoy  it,  but  then 
friends,  you  are  worldly,  and  your  spirit  is not  yet  touched,  your  soul  is not  yet  touched.  Yes.  And  as  long  as  you 
stay in that condition without getting desperate to go further with God you are going to manifest something one of 
these days, and that is, you are going to make up your mind for the world or the Word of God. I say, don‟t wait until 
that  moment: make  up  your  mind now,  and  it  is  so  easy  to  cross that  chasm.  Friend,  all  you  have  to  do  is  to  say, 
―Lord, I am a helpless man, help me. My heart is in the world and Lord; I am thinking of the world, I am between 
the Word and the world. Lord, I am a helpless man, please help me Lord. If you don‘t help me I‘ll be lost. I will do 
the same thing like other men under the message that are in so-called Pentecost I will do the same thing.‖ Brethren, 
there is no other way; you got to manifest it; you will be corrected.  
It‘s a terrible thing when you get corrected,  friends, and  you  start rebelling.  It  could  spell  out  two  things. 
That is why you got to be cautious. It could spell out one thing on one side: your soul is not yet touched and you are 
a rebel down  in  your heart.  And  then  on the  other hand,  friends,  if  you  continue  with  that rebellion  without  being 
corrected then you are a seed of the serpent. Now, that‘s the truth of it. Now, get that middle line that somebody 
could be corrected in a certain way and they get real angry. Now, they are yet in their evil nature but they are a child 
of God. But, if they continue to resist that correction over and over again, and they don‘t care what you have to say, 
they are wrong and strong, it may be a serpent seed that you are dealing with. 
 Anybody that you see sit under the Word of God, walk out, has their own plan, keep what they  want. To 
do what they want, live what they want and they do those things right in front of the brethren, the ministers, and the 
deacons. In other words, they indicate that they do not care anything. Their soul is not yet touched by the spirit. If 
you get hard upon them, and they start fighting, start carrying on, they are making manifest something else. It is one 
of  two  things  that  you  could  manifest  and  that  is:  you  could  manifest  that  your  soul is  still  dark  or  you  could 
manifest that you are a seed of the serpent.  
Why can‘t you hear my voice? Even because ye are not my sheep. I say, but my sheep hear my voice and a 
stranger they would not follow. (Ref. St. John 10: 25-27, St. John 8: 43-47). 
Now, these are lessons for us. And sometimes the Lord gives a lesson by an example because some people 
do  not  understand  the  Word  and  when  they  see  such  an  example  from  another  church,  another  place,  and  you

Do you know what Parham said just a few weeks ago? Even though he backslides he will never turn against 
the  Word  of  God.  Friends,  you don‘t know what next you will do when you get demon possessed. And that was 
what I told him. I said, ―You will get demon possessed and you don‘t know what next you will do tomorrow.‖ When 
a man becomes demon possessed, what happens to him; is that he is not his own, he is bought with a price and that

And Jesus confirmed that in John 3:19. And this is the condemnation, that light is come into the world, and 
men loved darkness rather than light, because their deeds were evil. 
 

 
MEN LOVE DARKNESS OF SIN AND UNBELIEF 
 
Let us stop for a moment and consider the master‘s words. Why would a man reject the light? Why would 
a man fight the light? Why would a man turn down the Word of God after he sat and heard it? Why would a woman 
do the same thing? Why would light come into the world? Because friends, they love sin. This is the condemnation. 
Now,  you are going to be condemned for that because  you  know  what is truth, you know  what is light and for the 
desire and pleasure of sin, you rejected the Word for the tree of the knowledge of good and evil and say, ―I want the 
tree of the knowledge of good and evil. I want. I settle out for this.‖ Light is come into the world and men loved 
darkness rather than light, because their deeds are evil.  
They  love  the  deeds  of  sodomy,  they  love  the  deeds  of  adultery,  and  they  love  the  deeds,  of  perversion. 
They love the deed of money, they love the deeds of marijuana, so they rather sell their soul for that marijuana, that 
money,  that  woman,  that  vice.  They  could  have  a bedroom  problem and they don‘t want to give that up at all. 
Perverted! They will even sell their soul for that. I could go into some stories which I would not go. But, I dealt with 
men, personally who sold their souls for that kind of bedroom perversion, yes, and they tell you out flat, ―That if my 
wife don‘t do that she don‘t love me.‖ They are like corbeaux, vultures, nasty, unclean spirits the Bible called it.   
Jesus said, ―And this is the condemnation, that light is come into the world, and men loved darkness rather 
than light, because their deeds were evil.‖ 
All right! They cannot face the light. Now, such people cannot face the light because they have secret sins 
in their lives that they don‘t want to give up. Why does a man sell out the Word? After hearing the Word of God like 
in the case of Judas, why did his soul still remain unanointed? We could find the problem right here. I will stop for a 
moment and I want you to catch this real good. 
The  reason  why  Pentecostalism  reached  thus  far  with  the  anointing  and  the  gifts  of  the  Spirit  and 
everything  that  they  manifested,  and  they  could  not  go  further  was  even  because  when  they  came  up  to  certain 
things in the Word of God from the prophet they did not want to give it up.  
Now, Judas was a dead Pentecostal. If there is a type of Pentecostalism, we have it in Judas. And now, we 
have it in men that are behind the pulpit today. Yes. Pentecostalism: anointed the same way. They brought over their 
anointing  from  Pentecost  and  they  brought  over  their  gifts  from  Pentecost.  But,  I  want  to  tell  you  something, 
beloved, they brought  over their deeds also. And do  you know  what they are trusting in? They are trusting in the 
fact that: ―I‘m anointed, and gifted, I could sing, I could preach so maybe that is all right with God.‖ No, friend. 
That isn‘t all right with God.   
Every  time  you  resist  correction  when  you  hear  the  Word  of  God  calling  for  that thing  in  your  life,  your 
space of repentance closes just a little bit. ―Is there a space of repentance, preacher?‖ Yes. The Bible said, ―And I 
gave that woman Jezebel space to repent and she repented not of her fornication and all those other things.‖ 
(Revelation 2:22) Behold, I will cast her into a bed, and them that commit adultery with her into great tribulation, 
except they repent of their deeds. Every man has a space of repentance and the space is not the same space of time. It 
does not have the same dimension. That is why you see thirteen year old boys die: their space closed. Do you think 
that these things are happening by chance? No. Do you think that‘s an accident? Their space closed: eighteen years, 
twenty  years, thirty  years, forty  years a man dies. And man comes right up to ninety-five  years, one hundred years 
and friends, his space was so big that on his dying bed he heard the gospel, and he said, ―I believe, pray for me.‖ The 
man took a dangerous chance to come right down to the closing space but God still had mercy upon the man. Now, 
every day that God spares the lives of people, it is really for them to repent. You have one purpose upon the earth, 
and that is to repent and be saved that you would be given eternal life. You don‘t know when that space is closing. 
That little fellow, thirteen years of age; that "animal" dealt with him, and broke his back and sodomized the 
little fellow. It‘s beyond comprehension. He broke the little boy‘s back, mashed up his teeth. My God! We live 
amongst  beasts. But the fact is, that little fellow‘s space of repentance closed that day,  and  I  hope  that  the  little 
fellow accepted the Lord even prior to that, and that criminal‘s space had not closed. The man is thirty-four to thirty-
five years of age and how long he will be in jail: his space is not closed. Every sinner could repent. Now, that is how 
it goes. 
 And this is a fearful thing that I‘m talking about. Young men, young women, I‘m not trying to scare you, 
friends,  there  is  a  space  of  repentance  and  then  when  you  hold  these  things  in  your  lives,  you  take  it  for  granted, 
tomorrow,  next week, next month, next year; you don‘t know when that space will close. Meanwhile these secret 
sins  that  you  are  cherishing  in  your  heart  are  preventing  the  Word,  and  the  Spirit  and  the  anointing  from  coming 
down in your soul while the door is closing everyday. 

A  man  came  in  here  riding  a  motorbike,  several  years  ago,  poor  fellow!  And  he  came  and  enjoyed  the 
meeting so greatly, oh friends, I tell you! He came over: what a great excitement the Word of the Lord was and the 
next day he died. Something knocked him down and he died. 
Another man came in here, and he heard the Word of God, he sat right there in the library where it used to 
be. In a few  weeks time after baptism he hanged himself. The man went on with the Lord. His space was going to 
close and the Lord led him.  
 
 
SPACE TO REPENT 
 
Now,  man  has  a  space  of  repentance;  and  when  you  have  these  things  in  your  life,  the  Lord  is  trying  to 
deal with you to get those things out because he knows you cannot enter the kingdom of God with them. No.  
Brother Branham sent a message by somebody, to a relative and said, ―Come and get baptized in Christian 
baptism or the undertakers will come and get you in the morning.‖ He said, ―Tell Branham, I don‘t have time with 
that, such, and such, and such, mind his own business, so and so.‖ The funeral agency picked him up in the morning; 
dead. Come when you are called. You got counsel, you heard the Word of God, beloved; you have heard preaching 
more than anybody on the earth. Yes. Repent! 
The prophet of God looked out upon a woman and said, ―Young woman, the Lord is calling you tonight.‖ 
She stomped out of there, and she met him outside and let him have it: ―Never you embarrass me like that again, 
Billy.‖ After a little while he met her coming down the road, she said, ―Billy, you know that night you called me? I 
am gone, I am lost, and there is no hope for me again.‖ And that woman knew that she was lost; and she was drunk.  
Another woman came in and Brother Branham was a young preacher. 
Matthew 13: 57 <...A prophet is not without honour, save in his own country, and in his own house.>  
And that woman sat down there half naked and the prophet of God took his jacket, and threw it on her and 
said, ―Cover yourself!‖ And then she pitched the jacket away, and stomped out of there and said, ―I wouldn‘t even 
give my cow that kind of a doctrine to eat.‖ She left, and went home, screamed for Brother Branham until she died. 
Before she died she said, ―I‘m lost. I‘m lost. Tell that preacher to forgive me. I‘m lost. I‘m lost.‖ My beloved, the 
space closed that very moment that she did that thing in the face of the prophet. And don‘t matter how much she 
called  for  Brother  Branham,  and how  much  she  prayed  her  space  was  closed.  Brother  Branham  in love  ran  down 
there and before he could have gotten there, her husband said, ―She cried, her bowel gushed. She cried and she died 
with her eyes open wanting to see the preacher. The husband said, ―Brother Branham, say a prayer for her.‖ He said, 
―That wouldn‘t do any good now.‖ That woman had crossed the line. (Hebrews: 6: 4-6). 
Beloved, we have to really watch our attitude. Secret sins were what Judas had in his life. I may not be able 
to justify that but Judas was a thief, and he used to thief the money from the bag, and being in love with money he

money. Pentecostalism under the message!  
So now, these people, they fear the light, they live in fear that somebody will tell on them. People that have

Brethren, didn‘t Jesus preach a lot about thieving, and covetousness, and a greedy spirit and the possessions 
of this world? [Congregation says, ―Yes!‖] Why Judas did not repent? He  was a covetous man, and he became so 
covetous  and  in  love  with  money  that  he  was  willing  to  sell  Jesus  for  thirty  pieces  of  silver.  Now,  you  see  why 
people  go  to  hell?  Jesus  said,  ―And  this  is  the  condemnation...‖  There  is  no  two  ways  about  it.  This  is  the 
condemnation. This is why a man is going to hell, this is why a man is going through the tribulation, that is why a 
man is not going in the rapture, that is why a man is going into the lake of fire, because when light comes to him he 
chooses the things of the world more than he eternal life. Don‘t forget this. The scriptures are plain. This is the

because you are a sinner, because you are a Christian and are making mistakes and are trying to overcome? No! You
