is come into the world, and men loved darkness rather than light.‖ And it has a reason behind it. ―...because their 
deeds are evil.‖  
Any  man  that  sits  down  and  hears  the  Word  of  God  year  after  year,  month  after  month  and  he  cannot 
believe it, he cannot comprehend it, he has a thousand questions, friends, his deeds are evil. That is why he cannot 
get revelation. And on top of that he wants to keep his deeds down in his heart, and figure out the Word. He then 
gets an intellectual understanding. His deeds are evil. 
 I  dealt  with two  big  people,  smart  people,  university  graduates and  everything. They  came  right here,  oh, 
they were around the message for several years and they belonged to the States. And friends, I tell you, those people 
had  a  list  of  questions,  and  questions,  and  questions  and  questions;  they  were  trying  to  prove  the  Word  by  their 
intellectualism. I took them out a little bit and they asked me about my testimony, which I don‘t boast about and I 
told them my encounter with God, and the pillar of fire, and God‘s voice speaking to me and such and such. And oh 
my,  the husband  was  elated.  Now,  the  wife  became  a  detective  and  she  came  back  afterwards  to  ask me  the  same 
thing. I said, ―I spoke to your husband but if you want to hear it I am going to let you know.‖ Little did I know they 
were investigating my story with their intellectual mind to see if it was consistent. I came to find that out afterwards. 
But, that‘s a story in my mind, and a picture in my mind and I don‘t speak contrary to it. I had be speaking about 
that for many years; maybe one of these days the picture might go a little dull because of age, but then, how can you 
forget such an experience with God.  
And those people after sitting, every time they met me they had one list of questions, the wife used to have 
a  list  of  questions  and  those  people  will  sit  right  there  in  the  meeting  and  take  notes.  I  looked  around  there  and 
thought: they are not getting what I am saying. If you get what I am saying you will take very little notes, because

problem and that was: she was a woman‘s liberation woman. They concluded one day that it‘s a cult. They were

When trials come, you are going to show who you are; and because you never got the Word down in your 
soul what will happen to you, is that you will become confused when heresies arise, when certain things go wrong in 
the church. You‘ll be confused: ―Who is right?‖ You will become an investigator: ―Let me investigate. Let me go 
and hear the enemy.‖ Let me tell you, friends, when the spirit of antichrist arises in any church, let me speak to you 
far  and  wide,  in  India  and  in  Africa:  stay  with  the  true  man  of  God.  Anytime  you  try  to  resist  that  enemy  by 
investigation, and try to find out this and find out that and say, in other words, ―I want to hear the two sides.‖ It 
could indicate that man could have no revelation and not yet born again. 
There arose a battle in 1974 and Brother Sookdeo made a wise decision. He had now come to the Word and 
the  split  took  place:  a  division  this  way,  a  division  that  way.  And  it  had  a  liar  on  the  pulpit  spreading  lies  right 
through and they  joined with a whole team of  churches, and ministers, ninety-five percent against five percent. All 
those  preachers  from  here  back  to  Guyana, to  the  States  and  everything  were  teamed  up  against  us, and  we  had  a 
little group there and we were in a brother‘s home: Brother Danny. God bless him. And Brother Sookdeo was caught 
in the middle. He was trying to hear this side and that side; and one day he came to the prayer house and he heard 
what I had to say. Although he could not have comprehended it. He said, ―Brother Bruce, I am going to follow this 
and  I  am  trusting my soul in your hand. You will be responsible for me.‖ I said, ―Amen, I will take up that 
challenge.‖ And that is how you have an assistant pastor today at Bethel.  
When a sheep cannot figure out something and they don‘t know which way to go they come near  to  the 
shepherd. The shepherd is set there to guide them into green pastures and still waters. But, if you have an intellectual 
mind: you want to listen to Tom, Dick, and Harry. You want to say, ―What you think about this, boy? Sister, what 
do you think about this? Brother what do you think of that?‖ I say, away with it and stand with your shepherd!  
Now,  we have seen that displayed in a wonderful way. Beloved, if those  brethren had not taken that line, 
and followed the corrections given, and listened to their shepherd they would have been confused but they are sold 
out. And they listened to their shepherd, and read between the lines, they listened to all the corrections for one year. 
I went by preaching there and said,  ̳Soul devouring offences.‘ What was Brother Bruce preaching? I said, ―There are

MENTAL BELIEVERS – TRIALS 
 
Now  brethren, mental  believers act in a different way. Now, if you don‘t have something down in your 
soul, in the time of uprising in the church, when an assistant pastor wants to take over, when some kind of a prophet 
rises  up  in  the  church,  when  you get  opposition  from  your  neighbour  in  the  faith:  a  mental  believer  becomes 
confused because they did not take enough time to put the Word down in their soul. So then, they start wondering: 
―Who is right?‖ Do you know how much of that we have seen, Brother Sookdeo? ―Who is right?‖ 
Look at a man sitting there. He is a lovely brother. I never thought he would have gone the wrong way, but 
friends,  when  that  thing hit,  and  those  spirits  started  to  move,  and ninety-five  percent  fought  against  five  percent, 
that man got carried away. As much as he loved me; and the man of God said unto him, ―Brother Bruce is the man 
of God, stay with him.‖ Not even that held him. He went way back until he completely backslid and went down to 
India to bow down to Sai Baba. I am talking about a man who was following the message who loved the Lord even 
because  his  soul  was  not  touched,  but  he  was  a  sincere  man.  The  Lord  had mercy  upon  the  man  and he  returned. 
And the Lord showed me that he was going to return. For years the Lord showed me that he will come and repent. I 
could not believe it when the Lord showed me that man standing in the back of the congregation and he will repent. 
He returned after many  years; after bowing down to Sai Baba. You will think that a man like that was gone but he 
was never rebellious against the Word. That‘s the difference.  He  was  never  rebellious  against  the  Word  nor  the 
message. No. That‘s a different spirit. It showed that he was not born again.  
When things go wrong in the church, like in the days of Jesus: a big scandal came out of the church. What 
was the big scandal? Well, a man manifested himself, and betrayed Jesus and sent Jesus to jail. Was that a scandal? 
He  sent  Jesus  to  jail, and  beside  that  they  sent  Him  to  the  cross  and  they  killed  him  as  a thief.  Why  did  the  Lord 
allow that? That was to make manifest what people had in their hearts. 
When  things  like  that  goes  on  in  your  church  there;  in  India,  in  Africa,  and  wherever  it  is  and  even  in

Prophets are born: gifted with visions and dreams 
 
Jeremiah 1:5 <Before I formed thee in the belly I knew thee; and before thou camest forth out of the womb 
I sanctified thee, and I ordained thee a prophet unto the nations.> 

Now, they are born in a certain way, born with a certain gift and that gift is down in them to see  visions, 
and dream dreams, and look back into people‘s lives, maybe a hundred years, and tell their house  numbers and 
names. That was why when Saul lost his donkeys he said, ―Isn‘t there a prophet around here?‖ They knew where to 
go. And he went and met Samuel. He said, ―Where are my father‘s donkeys?‖ He said, ―The donkeys are already 
found, and your father is worrying about you but I have business for you. Stay here all night.‖ (I Samuel 9:6).  
He  was  going  to  be  ordained  king.  A  little  donkey  raiser  was  going  to  be  ordained  king  and  the  prophet 
knew. So, anything that happened, they always asked for a prophet. They said, ―Where is the prophet?‖ 
Do you remember the three kings that were in the desert? Three mighty kings were going to fight a battle, 
and water ran out and they said, ―The Lord brought us here to destroy us. Isn‘t there a prophet?‖ And  one  fellow 
spoke up and said, ―There is a man called Elisha. Let him come forward.‖ And when the prophet came up there, he 
was so defiant of Jezebel‘s son that he said, ―Were not that I regarded the presence of Jehoshaphat, I would not even 
turn to see you.‖ You are talking about defiant and bold men. But one said, ―Nay prophet, we are begging you. God 
brought these three kings with all their armies to kill them. Say something.‖ He was born that certain way. A prophet 
is not a preacher or a joker. He is in direct communication with Almighty God. And certain ones are born in order to 
interpret God‘s Word and that is why they are called seers. A seer means a divine interpreter of the Word of God. 
Elisha was angry and he said, ―Bring me a minstrel,‖ which is a singing group. After they started singing, the Spirit 
of the Lord came back upon him and he contacted Almighty God from the seventh heaven. He said, ―Thus saith the 
Lord, dig this valley  full of ditches for I will fill it with water, and that is a small thing: I shall deliver the army of 
the Syrians into your hands.‖ He turned his back and walked away, back into the wilderness. Not for a prize, not for 
money, nor anything. God spoke through him. That‘s a prophet. (II Kings 3:10-18).

Ambition, pride, jealousy and contention 
 
I could  ask  a  simple  question: ―Had God only spoken by William Branham?‖ And I could give you the

everybody was wrong. For  anybody  to  contradict  that, they  are out  of  the  Spirit.  He  had  only  spoken  by  William 
Branham; likewise  He  had  only  spoken  by  Moses  at  that  time.  So,  you  can ask  a casual question, but  behind this 
question there was a lot of things that went with it and that was ambition, pride, self, lust, jealousy and contention, 
for more than what God allows you to do as a Christian or a minister. That was what was behind that. They were 
not satisfied with the position that God ordained them unto. They had great positions.  
Look at the position of Aaron. Don‘t you think that that man should have been contented? Look at the gift 
that Aaron got because  of Moses. Those were Moses‘ flesh brother and flesh sister. And God was so gracious that 
when He called Moses, He gave Aaron a place next to Moses. And Moses said, ―Lord, I am not an eloquent man, I 
cannot speak.‖ He said, ―Who made the mouth? I made the mouth. I called you to be a prophet, whether you could 
speak or not, you will remain my prophet.‖ (Exodus 4:10-14). 
God called Brother Branham and his English was not so polished, but he remained God‘s prophet. People 
find faults with the little impediments of William Branham, but Moses had a certain thing in his speech, he felt that

prophet, but Moses was God‘s prophet and nobody should have touched him.

―Know ye not that the saints shall judge the world? Know ye not that the saints shall judge angels.‖ (I

Pride, ambition and contentment 
 
Brethren,  let  us  be  careful  with such attitude.  Let  us  be  contented  with  the  money that God  gave  us,  the

be contented with how the Lord is using us. If He made you a song-leader, brethren, do not try to be the "boss-man," 
don‘t try to take that attitude: ―Well, I am in charge!‖ From the time you get that "in charge" spirit; what you are

hates boastfulness.  
A little brother prospering and you get that jealous spirit against him. God does not like that. No sir. And

Let us be contented. Do not jealous. God gave you a little something to preach, be thankful, and smite your

Confusion of mind in time of crisis 
 
Now, a man without divine revelation, he will be confused in a time of crisis, yes, and he does not know 
the antichrist. Now, were it not for the opening of the seals we  would be all confused. And we have to pity people 
like  that;  that  though  they  heard  the  seals  over  and  over,  and  all  the  preaching  of  the  church  ages,  and as  much 
preaching as we preach, what happened to those people is that they reached to a certain point, they only yielded their 
souls  that  much,  depending  upon  their  intellect. And then, do you  know  what  happened?  They  never  did  get  the 
Word down into their souls. If the Word is not there, it is not revealed. And if  you do not have the Word down in 
your soul, you cannot discern. You say, ―Discern?‖ Don‘t you know that everyone of  you must have discernment? 
You say, ―How could I discern. I do not have the gift of discernment.‖ You do not need the gift of discernment. 
There  is  something  greater that God  gave to you.  A  gift  of  discernment  is  secondary.  That  is  a  common  gift: 
discernment  of  spirits.  But  when  you  have the  greater  thing  to  discern  spirits, it‘s the Word  down  in  your  soul. 
(Hebrew 4:12). ―The Word of the Lord is a discerner of the thoughts and the intents of the heart.‖  
Hebrews  4:12 <For  the  word  of  God  is  quick,  and  powerful,  and  sharper  than  any  twoedged  sword, 
piercing  even  to  the  dividing  asunder  of  soul  and  spirit,  and  of  the  joints  and  marrow,  and  is  a  discerner  of  the 
thoughts and intents of the heart.>   
If you are sincere before God, you know who is standing here. You know friends, if I speak by inspiration 
or I speak by mental power. There are two  ways that a man can speak; by mental power, or by inspiration. And if 
you are born for this, when a man speak under inspiration, it blends together with your soul. ―My sheep hear my 
voice, and a stranger they  would not follow.‖ Yes. The voice  comes through man. Every little preacher here is the 
voice of God, if they are speaking the Word of God. If they were not speaking the Word of God, I will tell them to 
sit down. But they are speaking the Word of God, and if you are a sheep, you have got to respond.  
 You  just  cannot  sit  down  there  with  suspicion  when  something arise  in  the  church or you  pull  in  like  a 
turtle in a shell, after watching around. ―I got to  watch this thing.‖ Yes. You already  watched for three  years, four 
years, ten years, and you found no fault, and you testified about it. What are you watching now? Why did you start 
watching for now?  Why do you  have  it  on  a  test  now?  I  thought  you  tested  that  five  years  ago,  or  ten  years  ago. 
What are you testing now? It goes to show that you have no revelation, and I have something to test  you, and you 
have nothing to test me.  
I Corinthians 2:15 <But he that is spiritual judgeth all things, yet he himself is judged of no man.>  
 You cannot figure me with your big brain. You do not have to go to school to have to have a big brain. No. 
You  just have to be foolish. The wisdom  of this world is foolishness before God. You  just have to be  foolish, and 
you have to be proud, and think that you know something too. So you become foolish. The Bible says, ―And their 
foolish hearts were darkened.‖ 
 Sometime the seeds  of the heretic and heresies are planted so deep, that you cannot recognize the truth, 
and  you  cannot recognize  the  spirit.  Brethren, a  man may  come  in  here,  and not  understand  a  word,  but  the  Holy 
Ghost bears witness, that this is God. That alone should convince that man. But if you do not have the Word of God 
down  in  your  heart,  then  you  are  confused  when  the antichrist  moves. Yes and  when  the antichrist  moves  it  is 
edification to those who have the Word, because it confirms the Word. It helps them to understand and say, ―That is 
what the man said last  year. That is what he said at the seals. That is what he said five  years ago. That is what he 
always talks about, and I have a chance to see it moving in front of my eyes.‖ So you get an experience.  
 People  without  divine  revelation,  they  pull together into a corner and say, ―I am standing on neutral 
grounds.‖ That is not the message. Standing on neutral grounds is not the message. The prophet of God said, 
 ̳Taking sides with Jesus,‖ and Jesus is the Word, and if you do not know the Word, you are on neutral grounds, 
because you do not know if this is the Word, or if that is the Word. So you are on neutral grounds. You are a neutral 
hypocrite! That is what you are. A neutral hypocrite, because all the time you were standing for Jesus and you were 
standing  for  the  Word.  When  trouble  comes  up  in  the  church; ―I  am  on neutral  grounds,  on  this  matter.  I have  to 
make  an  investigation.‖ You  dead  hypocrite, you.  Yes.  Hypocrite!  You  do not  have  anything in  your  guts:  only  a 
bag of wind. You do not have anything down in there. If you had something down in your soul, you will know when 
a man speaks by inspiration, or not. Yes. Inspiration is a different thing. You do not have to have college education. 
You do not have to be in the message for ten, twenty years friend. No! If you are ordained of God, from the time you 
hear that man speak, you fall in love with that Word that he is bringing. Yes.  

 
 
Inspiration, not the man 
 
 I was explaining to Brother Peter Baptiste last night. He asked me a personal question. He said, ―Brother 
Bruce, when you go to the pulpit, does God talk to you?‖ So I blushed for a moment and said, ―Well Brother Peter, I 
come under inspiration.‖ He wanted to find out how that works. I said, ―I come under inspiration.‖ If I speak about 
Moses, I am transported, way back into the story. Sometime I do not see the people until I want to see them. (That is 
why a "sleeping spirit" will take me out of that frame of mind, because it is a spirit.) If I am talking about Goliath, I 
am transported, and then I forget my notes, and I am only describing under inspiration what I am seeing in the spirit. 
  In so doing I bring my congregation on the scene. The people of God, the children of God recognize that 
inspiration. They love to be in that inspiration, and they love to hear the words coming through inspiration.  I said, 
―They are not following a man or a personality. If I did not have the Word, nobody will know me. Yes. They would 
not even know my name.‖ But some cannot divide the inspiration from the man.‖ So in their carnal minds some 
think they talk about Bruce too much. That was Korah‘s idea, and Abiram‘s and Dathan‘s. But Moses was speaking 
under inspiration, and the people loved that inspiration.  
 It  is  not  the  man  that  they  love.  It  is  not his personality.  If  you  are  a  sheep  of  God,  you  blend  with  that 
inspiration. He turned around and said, ―Brother Bruce, I could  hear  your  voice  every  day.  I  could  hear  it for  the 
whole day; I do not get tired. Why is that?‖ I said, ―Well, you fell in love with the inspiration. It is not the man.‖ 
My  voice might be croaky, but my  voice is nothing, but you fell in love  with the inspiration of the Word, and you 
recognize the inspiration, but carnal minds cannot understand that. They will fuss, and say that they talk about him 
too much and it is a dangerous thing to have so much confidence in a man, and that is what happened to the people 
that followed Jim Jones. Carnal minds; they do not understand.  
 When you testify; it does not go down well with everybody. When you say, ―Bruce,‖ that does not go down 
well with  everybody,  because  we  have  three  kinds  of  believers. There  is  a  carnal  bunch that  still  have that 
Pentecostal  spirit.  They say, ―Give Jesus the glory. Give Jesus the glory.‖ But  they  want  the  glory? Now,  that  is 
Pentecostalism. This is that same kind of jealousy and hatred that accused Moses and W. M. Branham for talking the 
glory for themselves. That Pentecostalism has been brought over under the message today. So it is a bunch of carnal 
minds and men with filthy hands, trying to handle the Word of God.  
 Now, there is a difference  of handling the Word of God, mentally, from quotations, and from reading the 
Bible, and there is a difference of handling the Word of God under inspiration. The Prophet of God said, ―One man 
will  take  the  Word  of  God,  and make that  Word  of  God  live,  and  a next man  will  take  that  Word,  and  it  does  not 
mean very much. Yes. He said, ―It is not inspired to him.‖ 
 
Quote  W.M.B.: 141 Now,  have  you  ever  seen  this?  You  see  in  our  churches  today,  even  in  the  groups 
where  we have separated yourself and made organizations; and we seen all of this. And you seen a man pick up a 
certain Scripture, and, brother, that man can take that Scripture and make it live new, make it live just exactly what 
it promised here in the Bible. And the next man will see him do it, and he'll come around and try to do it and fail. 
Now,  I  hope  you're  reading  now.  He'll  fail.  Why?  The Scripture  is  not  inspired  to  him.  He's  only  trying  to 
impersonate. He's trying to act like something... Well, maybe he was sent by man. (Hearing Recognizing Acting On 
The Word Of God 60-0221). 
 
And I thank God for this inspiration. When I am finished here, brethren, I do not knock my chest, and say 
that I am a great preacher or I am a great man, and I am eloquent. No. That is not in my mind at all. Just like you 
thank God for the message. I go out and I thank God for the inspiration. Yes, and it only takes God to bring me into 
that  inspiration,  and  as  I  was  telling  the  brother that it takes  waiting  on the  Lord to break  into  that  channel  under 
inspiration, and if the Lord does not come and help me here, I cannot be a blessing to you in my preaching, and that 
is why I wait on the Lord until the right moment. At the right moment, I slip into that inspiration, and then there is

Then, this policeman here seated, he said, ―How do you know when to leave your chair  and  come to the 
pulpit?‖ (I did not know he was  watching that.) Just when I think that you are going to move now, that is the time

same  Spirit. I  just  do  not  run  up  there  in  myself. I  wait  on  the  Lord,  and  I  get  a  little  nod  from  the  Lord,  the 
inspiration starts from that chair, and then I know it is time to move, and the Lord gives me that inspiration.  

 Now, brethren that does not come by practice. Another man will try that, and he might be successful. But it

 Now, if  you  come  in  contact  with  that  inspiration,  one  week,  one  month,  three  months,  six  months,  nine 
months, one year, two years, three years, four years, five years, what do you have to check out about me, after God

Something is wrong with your Revelation. When something arise in the House of God that is not the time to check. 
No. When you came here on that the first day: the first three months you were checking. Six months, the first year,

Something  is wrong  in  your  soul.  Nothing is  wrong  with me.  Something is  wrong in  your  soul. The  Word  is not

 The first day that this former Muslim fellow, walked in here, boy, I tell you, the Word was so powerful, he

Word, message not mixed with faith 
  
 Numbers  16:41-50 is a  clear picture  of  the  things that  I  just  said.  A  picture  of  what  I  just  said  there  that 
destroyed  fourteen  thousand,  seven  hundred  people  by  a  plague  of  death  is  what  I  am  going  to  place in  this  little

 Hebrews 4:2 <For unto us was the gospel preached, as well as unto them: but the word preached did not

They never had a revelation of Moses. They never had a revelation of who William Branham really was.

 Now, this here is a terrible thing, and where there is no open vision the people perish, and though they were

 They  followed  him  by  the  millions,  for  thirty  long  years,  and  when  he  started  to  bring  the  Word,  they

A MIXED MULTITUDE FOLLOWED: KORAH. IT CAUSED TROUBLE

Korah and company under the message 
 
Now, if we are to analyze this statement. Let me briefly bring your attention to Numbers 16, Korah and his 
company.  Brethren,  here  is  a  man  with  a  pillar  of  fire,  a  cloud,  opened  the  Red  Sea,  brought  them  to  a  mountain 
called  Sinai.  God, with his  audible  voice  spoke  to  this  man,  and  in the  hearing  of all  Israel,  God  spoke  until  they 
begged, not to hear the voice of God, and said, ―Let Moses speak, lest we die.‖ They were positive that this man was 
in contact with God, and these same people put God out of their thoughts, and there was a lot of gossiping going on 
under Moses. Their wives, and there children had known that.   
 So men arose  with pride and ambition, in the congregation, and first of all they started with a tale. Satan 
moves  with  gossips and  interpretations,  and  different  ideas,  yes,  and  Korah  was  the  main  figure  in  this matter. 
Korah got jealous. Maybe he contacted Miriam, and he started discussing this issue with his wife, and said, ―Do you 
think that Moses take too much upon himself. I am a minister just like him. It is true that God used him to open the 
Red Sea, and he brought us to the mountain, but I think that we sat and learnt our lesson real well, for all this period 
of time, and we should have had some kind of credibility in the eyes of the people. But Moses of late, he started to 
showoff.‖ And  that  spirit  got  on  the  wife  and  on  his  teenage  children.  Yes,  and  then  it  went  over  to  a  neighbour 
called Abiram, and then Abiram went across there, and told another – Mr.  Dathan. Yes, and three of them agreed 
together, because three of them had jealous and ambitious spirits.  
 So  they  had  a  little  house  meeting  together  in  secrecy.  When  you  have  things  going  on  in  the  House  of 
God, there will  be little  discussions  in  the tents,  behind  the wall. They  were  discussing the  problem  in the  church. 
―You  know, Moses  could  be  wrong  in  this  matter? Yes. Moses  could  be  deadly  wrong  in  this  matter.  I  respect 
Moses. I am not saying anything evil against Moses. What do you think of it, Abiram? I was thinking just the same. 
It must be God. Look Dathan even confirmed this. What do  you think, Sister Dathan?‖ ―Hallelujah, brother; I feel 
the Holy Ghost.‖ (Old Pentecostal.) Listen, of late Moses started showing off, and all this time our husbands are in

 Friend, these people had their discussion behind the tent, in secrecy, although they knew that Moses was a

 So  they  started  to  talk  about  that subject,  saying, ―Do  you  imagine  that  Moses  is  the  prophet,  and  his

 God  never  called  an intellectual  to  interpret the Bible.  No  sir!  When  God  sends a  prophet; he  is  a  divine

 Moses did that by the will of God to convince them that those heretics were wrong. That is what I am doing

God is going to speak by you, you are going to be speaking that same message. That is the only way that God will 

speak through you, and that is, you have to speak the same things as that prophet otherwise you will be destroyed. 
And we can see that right here in this lesson. So, such negative statements proceeded out of a negative attitude. And 
that is the curse of the religious world, and that spiritual disease is present amongst the followers of the message. It

destroy billions of people today. I am going to prove that and we have proven that before. 
Now,  the  story  of  Moses,  for  our  visitors,  went  back  to  the  early  millenniums.  Moses  was  one  of  the 
greatest prophets that ever walked the face of the earth. And maybe  you did see the movie,  ̳Ten Commandments.‘ 
That is the same story in the Bible with some little twists. And what happened is that God‘s people  were a chosen 
people called the Israelites, or the Hebrews then. God was dealing with those people. After a certain time they found 
themselves in Egypt because of transgressions. And then, down in Egypt, which is a part of Africa, a state of Africa. 
Egypt ruled the world in that time. They built the great pyramids, and they were great scientists and everything. And 
then they enslaved the children of Israel or the Hebrews, because they grew in numbers, and God prospered them. 
They were jealous of these people. They were strangers in Egypt, and they grew and multiplied. And then, after four 
hundred  years,  according  to  promise,  God  sent  forth a  deliverer  and  that deliverer  was  born right  in  Egypt  land to 
deliver God‘s people. Oh my! The Lord is so good 
And the  little  baby was  born,  yes,  and  he  was  given  a  name  by  his  mother,  but  then  they  were  killing 
babies. The Pharaoh of that land was killing the male children. And then, the mother in faith and the father in faith, 
made a little basket of straw, and they put the little baby into the basket, and sent him down the Nile River, which 
still  exist  up to  today,  trusting  God  to  protect  the  baby  from  the  crocodiles  because  they  knew  that he  was  born  a 
deliverer.  
Who you  are, what  blessings  and  the  gifts  that  you will  manifest  in  life,  you  were  born  with  them. God 
ordained  you  a  prophet.  He  ordained  you  to  do  certain  things.  Your  jobs,  your  talents, etc., they  were  designed  in 
you before you even came here.  
And Moses  was born a deliverer to deliver Israel out of the hard labours of  bondage and slavery. And the 
Lord is so good that the basket landed amongst one of the princesses of the house of Pharaoh, and she drew him out 
of the water. And she said, ―Because I drew you out of the water, I shall call your name Moses.‖ (Exodus 2:10). So 
Moses means "drawn out of the water". So, it happened that the little fellow passed for an Egyptian for a long time. 
And God secured the baby right in the enemies‘ house,  and  caused  Pharaoh  to  care  for his  very  enemy  that  will 
destroy his kingdom. My Lord! You are talking about great God.  
Egypt is a great land because out of that, when the Messiah, Jesus was born and Herod was trying to kill the 
little  babies,  He  fled  into  Egypt.  Yes.  And  the  Lord  has  a  blessing  for  Egypt  and  He  said that ―Thou shall not 
oppress an Egyptian, for remember that thou was a stranger in his land.‖ (Deuteronomy 23:7). There is a law that 
you should not oppress an Egyptian.  
And it happened that this little deliverer grew up to be about forty years and yet he was not in his office. He 
was  a  great  military  man.  He  went  and  conquered  Ethiopia  and  married  an  Ethiopian  woman,  a  princess that 
betrayed the country. And this became a stumblingblock. Now, I am trying to paint a little picture.  
And this Miriam was a big sister. It is said that she helped put the basket into the water. She was a big sister 
and Aaron was a big brother, and maybe Moses was the last child of the family. They took that chance. And she was 
big and Aaron was big and old. So then, she had a hold on this little brother and she had something to look back to. 
―I am the one that put you into the water and saved your life.‖  
And then, it happened that God used Moses. You know the story in the book of Exodus. Read your Bibles. 
It is a big story. And He went and met God, spoke to God on the mountain, met a pillar of fire, came back to deliver

And time will fail to tell you all what happened in the land of Egypt. God sent this man, Moses with a staff 
to deliver all the children of Israel, to meet all the armies of Pharaoh, the king of kings in that time. Pharaoh means

When  you were  in  the rum  shop,  and  down  in  the  gambling  den,  and  as  a  prostitute,  and  wearing  your

messenger’s message Becomes common 
 
And this was the picture out here. So now, what was the problem? What was the attitude behind that great 
statement?  It is  that  the spiritual  things  became  common to  Aaron and  Miriam. That is  the  big  thing  behind this 
story. Moses became common. The miracles that he had done, the memory of them became common. Moses as their 
brother: ―That is our little brother. Moses, our little brother.‖ Yes. It became common to Aaron.  
And  Aaron  himself  was  exalted  into  one  of  the  greatest  positions.  He  was  the  high-priest  that  made 
atonement  for  all  the  two  million  people,  by  entering  into  a  place  called  the  Holy  of  Holies.  Nobody  could  have 
entered there but one man called Aaron, to go and carry the blood in there. When he went there, he met God face to 
face in the pillar of fire and the Shekinah glory, not in a physical form. But then the Pillar of Fire was standing there, 
and he felt the Presence of the Almighty, the same Presence that you feel in this building, just in a greater measure, 
greater than it was in the Holiest place. If the Lord would have brought this Presence, that you now feel, to Aaron, 
he would have died. He was not born again. He was a sinner, and his soul was not redeemed. And when he went in 
there, he  saw  the  pillar  of  fire. There  was  a  thing  called  the  Ark,  which is a  wooden  box,  and  inside  of  there  was 
Moses‘ message. Inside of there was a thing called manna, yes, which was a little wafer that God rained down from 
heaven for forty years to feed the Israelites. And it was there, and in the Shekinah glory it never rotted. And when he 
looked under that side, he saw Aaron‘s rod that budded and bore fruits and almonds overnight. He was privileged to 
see that. And then, a veil dropped behind him, and he and he alone, was chosen of God to see those things in there. 
And if a man had only moved that curtain a little bit and peeped in there, he would die. Great kings and great priests 
tried to do that and they perished. They were struck with leprosy and everything. And these things became common. 
Brethren, what a lesson we could learn there. What a lesson. They let the Presence of the Lord become common. 
Miriam herself was a great prophetess. The blessings of the Lord. So, hear this line up. We had a prophet 
called Moses. His brother, Aaron, was the high priest, second in command. And you had Miriam, a prophetess. And 
under them were the priests and the Levites that carried the Ark and everything. And they suffered much envy from 
a lot of ambitious men.  
But  what  happened  there  that  caused  this  statement  is  that  they  allowed  Moses,  the  man,  to  become 
common. And they forgot what God said about Moses. The position of Moses, brethren, was a great one. He was the 
meekest man upon the earth. God commended him. But I will tell you something: it is unbelievable to unbelievers, 
that  God made Moses God on  the  earth.  Could  you  imagine  something like that?  And he  was  still meek,  Gramps. 
The meekest man upon earth. God made the man God on earth and that never, never, never lifted up the man. You 

say, ―How is that, preacher?‖ One day Moses complained. He said, ―Lord, you are sending me to Egypt in that great 
learned place, and I am a man that cannot speak well.‖ The Lord said, ―I have chosen you for the job.‖ And Moses 
no doubt said, ―Let another man go, who could speak better than I.‖ He said, ―I have chosen you for that. You were 
born  a  deliver.  I  cannot  change  that  now.  You  were  foreordained  from  the  foundation  of  the  world  to  be  the 
deliverer.‖ And the Lord asked him, ―Who made the mouth? As certain as I made you, I made the mouth.‖ Yes.  
When God chose the preacher, my friend, he is chosen. You cannot change that. Nobody can change that. 
And whether he could speak or not, or he has an impediment in his speech, friend, that does not change God‘s mind. 
Whether he is bandy-legged or he has one eye, like Seymour, that does not change it. No. God chose the man‘s soul 
to do the job, and He knows that, that soul will yield to Him, regardless of his infirmities or whatever is in the man, 
that is the man for the job. He had seen that before the foundation of the world. 
And He said, ―Okay, Moses, we will settle that issue. I received your complain.‖ He said, ―What I will do 
is that you will be God on earth. You stand in My place and you be God on earth. And since God speaks through His 
prophets only, I will give you a prophet. And your brother Aaron will be your prophet. And when you have to speak, 
just tell Aaron what you want to say and then Aaron will speak for you.‖ My. Isn‘t that wonderful? Now, brethren 
that alone proved that God has a way to speak to His people, and that is He speaks through a prophet. (Amos 3: 
7). That is how God brings a message to the nations, to the people, to the generation. He speaks through a prophet. 
And  He  was  going  to  speak  through  a  prophet,  to  Israel  in  that  time,  called  Moses,  but  the  man  had  a  little 
impediment in his speech. Like Brother Branham, a little impediment, but that never changed the office of William 
Branham. So now, the Lord told the man, He said, ―Listen, you are going to be God here. You are so meek, be God 
and I am going to give you a prophet, since God speaks through a prophet. I cannot change that system, so I will let 
you speak and Aaron is going to repeat what you say.‖ So now, whatever Moses had to do, he took the staff and 
handed it to Aaron. So close to the prophet. Yes. And he will speak. And the Bible said, ―And God spake to Moses, 
and Moses spake to Aaron to speak to the children of Israel.‖ He was God  on  earth and he  was  the  meekest  man. 
What about if God makes  you God? Boy, I tell you. We might kill everybody that comes in our way, but that man 
was meek and he was not even born again. Yes. That is great discipline.  
So, these people forgot all about that. They forgot that, that was God in flesh upon the earth. Yes. It became 
common to them because that was their brother. They could have gone into his house, yes, and say, ―Moses, what 
did your wife cook there?‖ ―See if she had some roti or something  there  like  that  and  bhagie (spinach). Fix up.‖ 
While the other man had to wait for a whole six months to  see Moses. Yes. They let things get common. And not 
only  that,  brethren,  what  fooled  those  people  was  that  they  had  gifts, they  had  blessings.  And  I  will tell  you  what

we sound, we are a people who believe that there comes a certain time on earth when we will literally disappear! I 
am  talking  about  disappearing  from  the  face  of  the  earth,  and  breaking the  law  of  gravity  and  climbing into  the 
seventh heaven. I believe that with all my heart, and it happened in the Bible before. Yes. 
There was a man whose name was Enoch, and the Bible said, ―He walked  with God, and he was not; for 
the Lord took him.‖ (Genesis 5:24). He went away in a rapture. And then, there was another man, walking one day,

the earth, yes sir, and another prophet was there and he cried out and said, ―Behold, the horsemen of Israel and the

straight into glory. Why can‘t I believe that when the Bible speaks about it? We are believers. Somebody says, ―I do 
not believe that.‖ It is not for you. That is all. You were not even born for that, but we believe that. 
And then, there came another man called the Lord Jesus. And He was an ordinary carpenter, but then after 
that He challenged them. He said, ―Destroy this temple and I will raise it up in three days.‖ (John 2:19). And then, 
they  killed  the  Messiah,  our  Lord  Jesus.  They  put  Him  in  a  tomb,  and  on the  eighth  day  an angel  came  down  and

Acts 1:11 <Ye men of Galilee, why stand ye gazing up into heaven? this same Jesus, which is taken up from 
you into heaven, shall so come in like manner as ye have seen him go into heaven.> Yes.  
I  want  to  tell  you  that  that  cloud  appeared  upon  the  earth  in  1963,  just  as  promised.  But  the  cloud  was 
veiling somebody. After a certain time that our Lord went up into the air, there was a cloud that came, and received

EQUAL WITH WILLIAM BRANHAM

There is hardly a man that you could find that does not know everything. It is a fearful thing to tell a man

―How hardly would a rich man enter into the kingdom of God.‖ (Matthew 19:23). Even because his wealth

NO BIRTH, NO OUTPOURING – NO OUTPOURING, NO RAPTURE 
 
All our messages preached that went out in fifteen books already is  very simple, followers  of Malachi 4, 
all  Christians,  any  individual  that  has  to  go  in  the  rapture  must  have  an  outpouring  of  the  Spirit.  And  for  you  to 

depend upon the outpouring of 1906 is to go through the tribulation. Our contention is very simple and we believe it.

rapture! No revelation of the Son of Man, no birth! No new birth, no outpouring! No outpouring, no rapture! That is

witness and your hearts bear witness, by the Holy Ghost. I have not one shadow of a doubt concerning that doctrine. 
My  beloved,  you are going to get an outpouring or you are not going in the rapture. And you have got to  break up

We proved throughout our messages that the false anointed ones are right now under the message, and we 
are  contending  with  those  false  anointed  ones,  even  as  Moses  contended  with  them. This message,  as  promised

From Egypt land they journeyed with much obstacles, and they reached to a placed called Kadesh Barnea.

judge  them.  They  were  going  to  make  up  their  minds  to  go  in  faith  and  take  the  Promised  Land  or  they  were  all

And let me say this in a way that you could understand, brethren, that is the present stage of the followers

Do  you  know  that  they  circled  so  much  until  they  reached  back  to  the  Red  Sea? [Congregation  says,

TO DENY THE OUTPOURING IS BLASPHEMY OF  
THE HOLY GHOST 
 
Kadesh is the place that Israel, God‘s people, called out by Moses, denied the promise of the hour. And 
this  is  where  the  message  followers  are  standing today, denying  the  promise  of  the  hour. Kadesh is the  place  that 
God judged them, where the Lord finally decided to curse those people that disbelieved His promise.  
What the Lord did was that He called a few men and said, ―Go and search out the land. Let us know if it is 
a good land.‖ Out of the whole congregation, certain people were eyewitnesses of this good land. So, they went over 
there, and they spied out the land and they said, ―The land is a real good land. It has milk. It has honey.‖ That  is 
symbolic,  to  show  you  the  goodness  of  the  land.  They  picked  a  little  bunch  of  grapes, that  two  men  had  to  carry. 
That is some grapes! They came over and they told Moses, ―That land is just like what you said, but we are not able 
to take it.‖ "Unbelief." (Hebrews chapters 3 & 4). ―They entered not in because of their unbelief.‖ That happened at 
Kadesh Barnea, the judgement seat of God. And right there, friend, that angered God. He said, in other words, ―I had 
enough of that. I heard your murmuring, from the land of Egypt. All what you done, I forgave you for it, but I will 
not forgive you, for denying the promise of God. It is the blasphemy of the Holy Ghost. I will not forgive you. Your 
carcasses will fall in the wilderness.  
Now, type that to the hour in which we are living. For any  man to deny the outpouring of the Holy  Spirit 
and fight against it, it is the blasphemy of the Holy Ghost. It is to fulfill Hebrews 6. It is to fulfill Hebrews 10. It is 
the blasphemy of the Holy Ghost, and your carcass will fall in this world, and you will die and not go in the rapture. 
That is how we believe this message. 
Kadesh Barnea. The Lord got angry. That is the place that He wanted to kill them in a moment. And God 
will kill a man in a moment for denying His promise of the hour. The promise of the hour is God‘s heartthrob. For a 
man to rise up and say, ―There is no token coming. There is no outpouring coming. Bruce is fooling the people, and 
there  is  no  capstone  coming.‖  You  are  going  to  find  out  who  is  fooling  who.  Some heretic  is  fooling  you 
somewhere.  Some  Abiram  fooled  you  somewhere.  Some  Korah  fooled  you  somewhere.  Some  Dathan  fooled  you 
somewhere. Some Miriam fooled you somewhere. There has got to be an outpouring of the Holy Spirit, and we are 
more than able to take the land! Yes. 
You say, ―Well, thank God I am not in that bunch.‖ O, I thank God too, friend, but you could reach to your 
Kadesh as an individual right here today, the judgement seat of God. When you sit under the Word of God, and you 
have in mind to go  out, and taste of the  world, and live like a dog and say when you have the time  you  will come 
back, you have reached your Kadesh Barnea. God could judge you any day. When you want to go and wallow in sin

Kadesh, as the Joshua generation.  
Not  all  failed at  Kadesh.  No,  my  brother.  The  Moses  group  failed  at  Kadesh  but  the  Joshua  generation 
arose, and they followed Joshua and followed Caleb. And they had the same spirit upon them. They were anointed 
differently. Yes. Joshua was anointed differently.  

And when Moses was going, God called him and said, ―Get set, climb up on this mountain, you are going

INDIVIDUALS AT KADESH – identify Joshua generation

Do you realize where Aaron‘s rod budded? It could not bud outside of where the Shekinah glory was. No! 
The Lord knew where that miracle could take place. He said, ―Bring it into the holiest place.‖ Friends,  and  the 
―Holiest place‖ came to meet us. I am telling you. The "Holiest Place," came out, yes, to meet the children of God,

Dr. Frank: Question 1: What is your position today towards Brother Branham‘s ministry? 
Answer: ... The message given to him would forerun the second coming of Christ. We see the worldwide 
fulfilment thereof over the past forty years and to this day.  
 
E.O.D.H.  Answer: 1. The  answer  this  Doctor  is  giving,  is  that  he  believes  in  the  commission  of 
Brother  Branham.  Now,  he  is  stressing here  with  underlines,  that he  believes  the  message  will  forerun the  second 
coming of Christ, because he has an interpretation to follow. If you notice, he is very careful not to say that Brother 
Branham  was the forerunner but the message is the forerunner. Do you know why? See how weak this man‘s 

argument is. He said, ―Gordon Lindsay was the best witness that he could have spoken to concerning Brother 
Branham‘s gift.‖ I want to tell you here, doctor, if you don‘t have the discernment; Dr. Lindsay was a modern Judas. 
And  you  must  have  something  in  common  with  Mr.  Lindsay,  for  you  to  speak  so  highly  of  Mr.  Lindsay,  when 
Brother Branham dismissed such a man from being a campaign manager. He appeared in E.O.D.H book fifteen as a 
modern Judas. He stole money and everything from Brother Branham‘s campaign. And you are talking about this 
man. You both must have something in common and the same spirit.

Dr. Frank:  “Question 2: What is the actual wording of the commission given to William Branham?‖ 
Answer: ―... the message that is given you will be a forerunner of the second coming of Christ.‖ 
 
E.O.D.H. Answer: 2. In his answer he is emphasizing here that the message is the forerunner, and he 
is asking, ―When was that ever changed from the original prophecy that says the message is the forerunner?‖ He has 
a plan out here. Yes. And I will tell you what his plan is. I already went through his doctrine. His plan is that he is 
also forerunning the coming of Christ. That is his doctrine. So now, he has to wipe out William Branham from the 
picture  in  order  to  state  there  that  he  is  now  carrying  the  message  and  the  message  is  the  forerunner  and  still 
continues to forerun. How dumb a theologian could be. Brethren, look how simple that is. We could disprove that.  
John the Baptist was the forerunner of the Lord Jesus. When he introduced the Lord Jesus, that put an end 
to John the Baptist. And do you know that John confirmed that? He said that Christ is the greater light and he must 
increase.  But  he  was  the  lesser  light  and  must decrease. Is that the Word of God? [Congregation says, ―Amen!‖] 
Now, let us say that was the statement the angel used: ―Your message shall forerun the second coming of Christ.‖ 
Brother  Branham  said in many  places,  different to  that.  Why  did  he  say  differently  to  that? The message  and  the 
messenger are one, so, there is no contradiction if Brother Branham quoted the prophecy saying ―you will forerun 
the second coming of Christ‖, because the message and the messenger are one. When a prophet is given a message 
to bring to God‘s people, he is the very message of that age, because he is identified with the Word of God and the 
message of the hour.

Heretical Article No. 549:  
Dr. Frank: Question 3: A. What is your conviction in regard to the ―end-time message‖? 
Answer: I  believe  with  all  my  heart  and  all  my  soul,  the  true  Word  of  God  as  proclaimed  by  William

E.O.D.H. Answer: 3 A. Did you catch on to that error there? Now a person not looking carefully will 
say  that  this  man is  saying that he  believes  the  message.  Do  you  know  what this  man is  saying here  friend?  He  is 
saying that he believes that part of the message that Brother Branham confirmed with the Word, and the other things 
may not be the Word, thus ―I leave it aside.‖ So now that is a death trap right here. In other words, he is saying that 
he could pick out what is the Word from the message, and what is not the Word.  
 I  am  saying  that  the  message  that  William  Branham  brought  is  a  revelation.  All  the  words  of  Brother 
Branham were not perfect. The revelation that he brought is perfect, and if you are in the spirit that is what you are 
hearing,  the  revelation.  You  do  not  hear  the  stammering.  You  do  not  hear  the  stuttering,  or  when  he  says  Mary, 
rather than Elisabeth. No. No. No. The revelation is in those words of the prophet. Yes. It is a vision.  
 But  an intellectual  will catch on to the stuttering, catch on to the stammering and say, ―You see here, he 
made a mistake. Over here he said seven hundred, when it was seven thousand that God reserved for Elijah.‖ I do 
not hear it. No sir! I do not hear it. I am following the revelation. The revelation is perfect, and God has chosen the 
foolish things of the earth to confound the prudent and wise, and the base things of the earth to bring to naught the 
things which are, that no theologian should glory in his sight. 
This is the glorification of a theologian, saying that he is coming to sift out the Word and the rest of it he 
does  not  want to  hear it.  Intellectualism.  Yes.  So  he  said that he  only  take  the  things  within  the  boundaries  of  the 
Word. I will stop here for a moment. Any man who thinks that he could pick out what is the Word in the message, 
and  what  is not  the  Word in  the message, he  is  claiming  a greater  gift than Moses‘. He is claiming a greater gift 
than what God sent today. And a theologian is not greater than a prophet.  
 God never  did  use  a  theologian at  any  time to  correct a  prophet, though the  Pharisees  and  Scribes  tried, 
and  they  sent  him  to  the  cross.  No  theologian  is  ordained  to  correct  a  prophet.  No  big  brain  university  man.  No 
intellectual.  No  cardinal.  No  pope  can  contradict  a  prophet.  Cannot  expose  a  prophet.  He  is  right,  and  the  whole 
world is wrong. That is the way that I believe Branham. That is the way that you must believe Branham and every 
messenger that God sent. He had the seven of them in his hands. He was holding them in his hands. And Luther had 
a lot of mistakes. Wesley had a lot of mistakes, but they each had a perfect revelation for the day in which they were 
living.  
 The revelation was perfect. You  were going to listen to that revelation or perish, and any man that would 
not  listen  to  the  revelation  of  William  Branham will  perish  today, just  like  Korah,  Abiram  and  Dathan  perished. 
Korah was playing that he was some kind of theologian to correct Moses. The earth opened up and swallowed him.   
 A man who is answering that question will just say, ―Yes, I believe the message of Brother Branham. The 
message was inspired.‖ But Dr. Frank said, ―I believe with all my heart and all my soul, all the Word of God as 
proclaimed  by  William  Branham  under  the  term  the  end-time message.‖ Slick like a serpent‘s tongue! In other 
words, some teachings are not the Word, and he is gifted to set them in order.

TRAITS OF PENTECOSTALISM UNDER THE MESSAGE: QUESTIONS

CHAPTER THIRTEEN 
 
I am  Brother  Roy  Barrow,  a  former  Pentecostal  for  thirteen  years:  1964 to1977. I  confirm,  fully  support 
and endorse all the things that were preached and published by God‘s servant on 100 years of Pentecostalism, to be 
true, for I was among them.  
As a boy, I  went to church and to Sunday  school, where I was taught Bible stories and sang sacred songs 
and choruses. 
As I advanced in age and approached teenage life, I became  wild, having my  own way, disobedient, rude 
and rebellious.  
In  1964,  my  life  was  miraculously,  supernaturally  and  dramatically  spun  around. A  Pentecostal  began  to 
witness to me about how the Lord Jesus Christ came into the  world, bled and died on the cross to save sinners. At 
the end of his witnessing to me, he asked me if I wanted to accept Christ as my Savior, and I said, ―Yes‖, and I 
meant it.  
From that time a dramatic and drastic change came over my life. It was two weeks after that I realized that I 
had stopped cursing (I was a ―cuss bird‖), lying, stealing and being rebellious in such a way that I was amazed. The 
village  was  shocked  and  surprised  and took  note  of  the  change  that  came  into  my  life  and  was  glad  for  me. I lost 
taste for dancing that I had loved very much, for partying and for carnival. I lost taste for calypso music, country and 
western and sentimental songs, and all worldly music. I stopped going to cinemas. I stop chasing girls and I began 
living for Christ. 
I  got  baptized  in  water  in  the titles  of  Father,  Son  and  Holy  Ghost  at  Goldsborough  river  Tobago,  and 
where  I  continued  to  serve  the  Lord.  I  was  told  that  the next  step  was  for  me  to  get  filled  with  the  baptism  of  the 
Holy Ghost.  
 I wanted the baptism of the Holy Ghost. A man who we knew, in the Pentecostal circles, as the Holy Ghost 
man, Pastor Hector, came to Pembroke Tobago, and on a Friday night meeting he was tarrying with those who did 
not have the baptism of the Holy Ghost. 
 He told me, ―Just say,  ̳hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah. Say it faster, faster and faster‘‖, until an 
anointing came upon me and I began to speak in tongues. From thereon I spoke in tongues, prayed in tongues, sang 
in tongues above many youths my equal: and even the adults in my church, until I came to Bethel, where the Word 
took away my tongues and put it in its place.  
 As a Pentecostal, I was full of zeal, zest and impetus for Christ. I was hungry and thirsty for God. I wanted 
God to use me. I wanted every spiritual gift and I wanted to be used of God. I attended almost every service, which 
was  five  times  a  week,  plus  other  departmental  meetings.  In  those  days,  I  walked  three  miles  to  church  and  back 
with  some  of  the  brethren.  As  we  walked  those  lonely  roads,  we  sang  those  sacred  songs  and  choruses,  bubbling 
with joy and great happiness.  
Beloved, the  Pentecostal  world has  perverted all  those  sacred  songs  and have  brought  calypso,  rock,  soca 
and dub into the church to see if they can win the world. 
As a young believer I ate God‘s Word, I memorised my scriptures and I was a ―praying mantis‖. When I 
prayed, you could have heard me in the distance calling upon God and speaking in tongues like an automatic pistol. 
When that anointing came up me and I spoke in tongues, I used to feel way up in the Spirit, and I felt I could have 
taken on any devil, but it never worked. 
I  fasted. We  prayed  all  night. I  desired  power  to  heal  the  sick  and  to  cast  out  demons.  I  prayed  and  laid 
hands  on  the  crippled  and  they  remained  crippled.  I  prayed  for  the  demon  possessed  and  they  remained  demon 
possessed. 
As a young man, I would jump on my bicycle, ride to Speyside and Roxborough to preach to young people, 
and rode all those lonely roads back at 9:30 –10:30, all by  myself, in the night. I held almost every position in the 
church and I was a fireball for God.
